      extension: .Rmd

    display_name: R
    language: R

  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
---

```{r message=FALSE, echo=TRUE}


set.seed(12345)
library(caret)
library(glmnet)
library(kableExtra)
library(ranger)
library(randomForest)
library(foreach)
library(doParallel)
library(MLmetrics)
library(rstatix)
library(dendextend)
library(pheatmap)
library(tidyr)
library(DT)
library(ggplot2)
library(plotly)
library(purrr)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(stringr)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(circlize)
library(tibble)
library(msigdbr)
library(pheatmap)
library(networkD3)
library(ggpubr)
library(factoextra)
library(fpc)
library(cluster)
library(glmnet)
library(biomaRt)
library(gprofiler2)
library(FactoMineR)
library(e1071)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(patchwork) 
library(forcats)
library(fpc)
library(clValid)
library(clusterSim)
library(DESeq2)
library(ggrepel)
library(dplyr)



base_dir <- "/home/jaimeniguez"


```




# Introduction

En este Markdown se genera la primera parte de la pipeline, la cual contiene los siguientes apartados generales:

- Selección y tratamiento de los datos.

- Selección de las pathways a incluir.

- Clustering basado en transcriptómica e identificación de clusters con mayor severidad.

- Generación de severity scores Motor y No Motor mediante agrupación de las señales obtenidas.

- Relación del severity score con las covariables clínicas.

- Predicción de severity score utilizando transcriptómica.

Los cambios introducidos en este documento son la **inclusión de un modificador para el score**, de manera que cada señal contribuye de manera proporcional a la diferencia entre los clusters comparados. También se añaden apartados con **análisis de la relación del score con el valor de covariables clínicas** y con la **predicción del severity score utilizando la transcriptómica** como predictores.

Sobre estos cambios se realizaron además:

- El **cálculo del severity score modificado para covariables numéricas** pasa de: sev_score_mod <- abs(median(cluster_i[[variable]]) - median(cluster_j[[variable]])) / abs(median(cluster_i[[variable]])) + abs(median(cluster_j[[variable]])) a sev_score_mod <- abs(median(cluster_i[[variable]]) - median(cluster_j[[variable]])) / max(median(cluster_i[[variable]]), median(cluster_j[[variable]]))

- Al calcular la **relación entre los resultados de severity score y el valor clínico** de las distintas covariables ahora se incluyen los resultados para severity score **con y sin modificación**, así como resultados desglosados **por visitas** (a su vez se presentan los resultados para el score acumulado de visitas anteriores y para el score puramente de la visita en cuestión).

- En el apartado de predicción se utilizan modelos ridge regression, lasso y random forest para **predecir el valor de severity score de las visitas futuras** utilizando la transcriptómica de visitas anteriores. Se incluyen resultados para severity score modificado y sin modificar.


- Por último se incluye la predicción de los SRG mediante transcriptómica. Se incluye la predicción del SRG de la misma visita y el acumulado de la misma con la siguiente.

# Data Selection and Preprocessing


```{r}

# Patients metadata (covariates)
Covariates <- as.data.frame(readRDS(file.path(base_dir, "metadata_reduced", "PPMI_covariates_extra")))
rownames(Covariates) <- Covariates$sample_id


# Visit to include in the analysis
Visit <- c("M0","M12","M24","M36") # "M0","M12","M24","M36", "M6"

cohort <- c("Sporadic") #  "Healthy Control", "Sporadic", "GBA - Aff", "LRRK2 - Aff", "LRRK2 - Unaff", "SNCA - Aff", "SNCA - Unaff", "GBA - Unaff"

Diagnosis <- c("Case") # "Case", "Control"

# Pathways - Genes
# Subsets_pathways <- readRDS(file.path(base_dir, "Pipeline", "Subsets_pathways_msigdb_names"))

Subsets_pathways <- readRDS(file.path(base_dir, "Pipeline", "Subsets_pathways_Reactome"))


# Calcular la longitud (número de genes) de cada pathway
pathway_sizes <- sapply(Subsets_pathways, length)

# Pathway con mayor número de genes
max_pathway <- names(which.max(pathway_sizes))
max_size <- max(pathway_sizes)

# Pathway con menor número de genes
min_pathway <- names(which.min(pathway_sizes))
min_size <- min(pathway_sizes)

# Mostrar resultados
cat("Pathway con mayor número de genes:\n", max_pathway, " (", max_size, " genes)\n\n")
cat("Pathway con menor número de genes:\n", min_pathway, " (", min_size, " genes)\n")

```



### Filtering metadata

This filtering can be based on visit, diagnosis and mutation status

```{r}


Covariates %>%
  filter(!is.na(mutation)) %>%        # solo filas con valor en mutation
  group_by(mutation) %>%
  summarise(visitas = paste(unique(visit_name), collapse = ", "),
            n = n()) %>%
  arrange(mutation)


Covariates <- Covariates %>%
  group_by(participant_id) %>%
  mutate(mutation = ifelse(all(is.na(mutation)), NA, first(na.omit(mutation)))) %>%
  ungroup()


# Identificar los participant_id que tienen todos los valores de Visit
valid_participants <- Covariates %>%
  group_by(participant_id) %>%
  filter(all(Visit %in% visit_name)) %>%
  pull(participant_id) %>%
  unique()

# Filtrar los datos según las condiciones adicionales
Covariates <- Covariates %>%
  filter(participant_id %in% valid_participants &
         visit_name %in% Visit &
         case_control_other_latest %in% Diagnosis &
         mutation %in% cohort)


# Mostrar el dataset resultante
datatable(Covariates, options = list(
  pageLength = 10,
  searching = TRUE,
  scrollX = TRUE
))


```



```{r}
# Tratamiento de valores faltantes:

# Identificar las columnas numéricas
numerical_columns <- sapply(Covariates, is.numeric)

# Extraer los nombres de las columnas numéricas
Covariates_num_names <- names(Covariates)[numerical_columns]


# Calcular %NA
percent_na <- function(df) {
  # Calcular el porcentaje de NAs en cada columna
  na_percent <- colMeans(is.na(df)) * 100
  return(na_percent)
}


# Eliminar aquellas variables con % NA > 10%
PercentNA_Df <- as.data.frame(percent_na(Covariates), nm = "Percent.NAs")

PercentNA_names_clean <- rownames(subset(PercentNA_Df, Percent.NAs > 10))

Covariates_clean <- Covariates[,!colnames(Covariates) %in% PercentNA_names_clean]


Covariates <- Covariates_clean

PercentNA_Df <- as.data.frame(percent_na(Covariates), nm = "Percent.NAs")


# Imputar el resto de NAs con la mediana para variables numéricas y con el valor más común para las variables factor.
## Seleccionar las columnas numéricas
numeric_columns <- Covariates[, sapply(Covariates, is.numeric)]

## Calcular la mediana de cada columna numérica, ignorando los NA
medianas <- apply(numeric_columns, 2, function(x) median(x, na.rm = TRUE))

## Reemplazar los NA con la mediana de la columna solo en las columnas numéricas
numeric_imputed <- as.data.frame(lapply(1:ncol(numeric_columns), function(i) {
  x <- numeric_columns[, i]
  x[is.na(x)] <- medianas[i]
  return(x)
}), col.names = colnames(numeric_columns))


## Seleccionar las columnas no numéricas
non_numeric_columns <- Covariates[, !sapply(Covariates, is.numeric)]

## Función para calcular la moda
calculate_mode <- function(x) {
  ux <- unique(x)
  ux[which.max(tabulate(match(x, ux)))]
}

# Reemplazar los NA con la moda de la columna en las columnas no numéricas
non_numeric_imputed <- as.data.frame(lapply(1:ncol(non_numeric_columns), function(i) {
  x <- non_numeric_columns[, i]
  moda <- calculate_mode(x[!is.na(x)])
  x[is.na(x)] <- moda
  return(x)
}), col.names = colnames(non_numeric_columns))

# Combinar las columnas numéricas imputadas con las columnas no numéricas imputadas
Covariates_imputado <- cbind(non_numeric_imputed, numeric_imputed)

# Opcional: Si deseas mantener el orden original de las columnas
Covariates_imputado <- Covariates_imputado[, colnames(Covariates)]

rownames(Covariates_imputado) <- Covariates_imputado$sample_id


# Comprobar si todas las variables están libres de NA
table(percent_na(Covariates_imputado) == 0)

Covariates <- Covariates_imputado

```


## Transcriptomics data {#sec:transcriptomics}

In this first section, the file containing the expression values of the selected genes in PPMI patients will be loaded.
It includes data for all visits. Additionally, it contains columns with the diagnosis and sample ID, which will be filtered out.

```{r warning=FALSE}

# This dataset contains the samples resulting from previous data selection (2832 samples × 58,780 genes)
PPMI_exp <- readRDS(file.path(base_dir, "1aFase_ReducirGenes", "PPMI_exp"))

dim(PPMI_exp)

# Patients from the selected visit are retained
PPMI_exp_case <- PPMI_exp %>%
  filter(row.names(.) %in% Covariates$sample_id)


# Case samples (sample_id = "Case") are selected. A merge is then performed with the Covariates dataset, which has been previously filtered.
PPMI_exp_case$sample_id <- rownames(PPMI_exp_case)
case <- Covariates[, c("case_control_other_latest", "sample_id")]

PPMI_exp_case <- merge(PPMI_exp_case, case, by = "sample_id")

# The sample_id is set as the row names, and non-expression variables are removed.
rownames(PPMI_exp_case) <- PPMI_exp_case$sample_id
PPMI_exp_case$sample_id <- NULL
PPMI_exp_case$case_control_other_latest <- NULL

PPMI_exp <- PPMI_exp_case

```


### Variance Stabilizing Transformation

```{r eval=FALSE}

PPMI_exp_log2 <- vst(as.matrix(t(PPMI_exp)))

PPMI_exp <- as.data.frame(t(PPMI_exp_log2))

```


```{r echo=FALSE}

# saveRDS(PPMI_exp_log2, "PPMI_exp_vst")

PPMI_exp_log2 <- readRDS("PPMI_exp_vst")

PPMI_exp <- as.data.frame(t(PPMI_exp_log2))

```



```{r echo=FALSE}

# An example of the contents of the dataframe is displayed.
datatable(PPMI_exp[1:50, 1:50], options = list(
  pageLength = 10,
  searching = TRUE,
  scrollX = TRUE
))

```


### Gene filtering 

To reduce the number of genes, those presenting a minimum expression threshold in at least 80% of the samples were selected.

A series of thresholds were tested, and the one retaining fewer than 20,000 genes was chosen.

```{r eval=FALSE}

# Create a vector to store the number of columns to retain for each threshold.
num_columnas <- numeric()

# Iterate over different threshold values and store the number of columns to retain.
for (umbral in seq(0, 99, by = 1)) {
  # Calculate the percentage of high-expression samples for the current threshold.
  porcentaje_muestras_altas <- colSums(PPMI_exp > umbral) / nrow(PPMI_exp)
  
  # Retrieve the names of the columns that meet the criterion.
  columnas_a_mantener <- names(porcentaje_muestras_altas[porcentaje_muestras_altas >= 0.8 & !is.na(porcentaje_muestras_altas)])
  
  # Count the number of columns to retain.
  num_columnas <- c(num_columnas, length(columnas_a_mantener))
}

saveRDS(num_columnas, "num_columnas")

```

```{r eval=TRUE, echo=FALSE}

num_columnas <- readRDS(file.path(base_dir, "Pipeline", "num_columnas"))

```

```{r}

# Plot the number of columns to retain as a function of the threshold.
plot(seq(0, 99, by = 1), num_columnas, type = "l", xlab = "Umbral", ylab = "Número de columnas a mantener"); abline(h = num_columnas[which(seq(0, 99, by = 1) == 6)], col = "red", lty = 2, lwd = 2)

```



```{r eval=FALSE}

# Vector de umbrales
umbrales <- seq(0, 99, by = 1)

# --- Función para encontrar el codo (distancia máxima a la recta extremos)
find_elbow <- function(x, y) {
  # extremos
  x1 <- x[1]; y1 <- y[1]
  x2 <- x[length(x)]; y2 <- y[length(y)]
  
  # distancias perpendiculares de cada punto a la recta (x1,y1)-(x2,y2)
  denom <- sqrt((y2 - y1)^2 + (x2 - x1)^2)
  d <- abs((y2 - y1)*x - (x2 - x1)*y + x2*y1 - y2*x1) / denom
  
  idx <- which.max(d)
  list(index = idx, x = x[idx], y = y[idx], distancias = d)
}

# Aplicar al caso de num_columnas
res_elbow <- find_elbow(umbrales, num_columnas)

# Mostrar resultado
print(res_elbow)

# Graficar con el punto del codo marcado
plot(umbrales, num_columnas, type = "l", xlab = "Umbral", ylab = "Número de columnas")
points(res_elbow$x, res_elbow$y, col = "red", pch = 19, cex = 1.5)
abline(v = res_elbow$x, col = "red", lty = 2)



```



Genes meeting the condition are selected using a threshold value of 8.

```{r}

# A threshold value is chosen, which must be reached by at least 80% of the samples for each gene expression.
umbral <- 6

# The number of samples exceeding the threshold in each column is counted, and the corresponding percentage is calculated.
porcentaje_muestras_altas <- colSums(PPMI_exp > umbral) / nrow(PPMI_exp)

# Retrieve the names of the columns that meet the criterion.
columnas_a_mantener <- names(porcentaje_muestras_altas[porcentaje_muestras_altas >= 0.8])
columnas_a_mantener <- subset(columnas_a_mantener, columnas_a_mantener != "NA")

# saveRDS(columnas_a_mantener, "18686_genes")

# Filter the dataframe to retain only the selected columns.
PPMI_min <- PPMI_exp[, columnas_a_mantener]

PPMI_exp <- PPMI_min

dim(PPMI_exp)

```

## Gene type stratification

```{r}

# ==============================================
# 1️⃣ Preparación
# ==============================================
if (!requireNamespace("biomaRt", quietly = TRUE))
  install.packages("biomaRt")
library(biomaRt)

# Conexión a Ensembl
mart <- useMart("ensembl", dataset = "hsapiens_gene_ensembl")

# Genes de tu matriz
genes_ppmi <- colnames(PPMI_exp)

# ==============================================
# 2️⃣ Extraer todos los genes de tus pathways
# ==============================================
# Aplanar todos los genes contenidos en la lista
genes_pathways <- unique(unlist(Subsets_pathways))

# ==============================================
# 3️⃣ Encontrar los que están en ambos conjuntos
# ==============================================
genes_intersect <- intersect(genes_ppmi, genes_pathways)

# ==============================================
# 4️⃣ Consultar información de biotipo desde Ensembl
# ==============================================
gene_info <- getBM(
  attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "external_gene_name", "gene_biotype"),
  filters = "ensembl_gene_id",
  values = unique(c(genes_ppmi, genes_pathways)),  # todos los posibles
  mart = mart
)

colnames(gene_info)[1] <- "Gene"

# ==============================================
# 5️⃣ Añadir información de coincidencia y recuento
# ==============================================
# Marcar si el gen aparece en alguna pathway
gene_info$Found_in_pathway <- gene_info$Gene %in% genes_pathways

# Contar en cuántas pathways aparece cada gen
pathway_counts <- table(unlist(Subsets_pathways))
pathway_counts <- as.data.frame(pathway_counts)
colnames(pathway_counts) <- c("Gene", "Pathway_count")

# Combinar con la información de biotipo
gene_info <- merge(gene_info, pathway_counts, by = "Gene", all.x = TRUE)

# Rellenar los genes que no aparecen en ninguna pathway con 0
gene_info$Pathway_count[is.na(gene_info$Pathway_count)] <- 0

# Añadir si pertenece a PPMI_exp
gene_info$In_PPMI_exp <- gene_info$Gene %in% genes_ppmi

# ==============================================
# 6️⃣ Resultado
# ==============================================
# Ver resumen de biotipos de los que están en pathways
table(gene_info$gene_biotype[gene_info$Found_in_pathway])

# Vista previa de la tabla final
head(gene_info)

# ==============================================
# 7️⃣ (Opcional) Guardar en CSV
# ==============================================
write.csv(gene_info, "Gene_biotypes_PPMI_and_pathways.csv", row.names = FALSE)


table(
  gene_info$gene_biotype[
    gene_info$In_PPMI_exp & gene_info$Found_in_pathway
  ]
)

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Filtrar solo los genes de interés
biotipo_tabla <- table(
  gene_info$gene_biotype[
    gene_info$In_PPMI_exp & gene_info$Found_in_pathway
  ]
)

# Convertir a data.frame para ggplot
biotipo_df <- as.data.frame(biotipo_tabla)
colnames(biotipo_df) <- c("Gene_biotype", "Count")

# Crear etiqueta para la leyenda con número incluido
biotipo_df <- biotipo_df %>%
  mutate(Legend_label = paste0(Gene_biotype, " (", Count, ")"))

# -------------------------------
# Barplot con leyenda numerada
# -------------------------------
ggplot(biotipo_df, aes(x = reorder(Gene_biotype, -Count), y = Count, fill = Legend_label)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "",
    x = "Gene biotype",
    y = "Number of Genes",
    fill = "Biotype (n)"
  ) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))


ggplot(biotipo_df, aes(x = "", y = Count, fill = Legend_label)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 1) +
  coord_polar(theta = "y") +
  theme_void() +
  labs(title = "Biotype gene proportion",
       fill = "Biotype(n)")



gene_match <- gene_info[gene_info$In_PPMI_exp & gene_info$Found_in_pathway & gene_info$gene_biotype == "protein_coding", ]$Gene


# PPMI_exp <- PPMI_exp[,gene_match]

```




## Clinical Covariates for Dendrogram Labeling

The Covariates dataset will be used to label the samples in our dendrogram. For this purpose, covariates will be selected, each of which reflects some degree of Parkinson’s disease severity.
         
         
### Usar variables agrupadas (Eval)         
```{r}

PPMI_label <- Covariates

# Covariates indicating some level of disease severity are selected.

Cov_severity <- c("mds_updrs_part_i_summary_score","code_upd2101_cognitive_impairment","code_upd2102_hallucinations_and_psychosis","code_upd2103_depressed_mood","code_upd2104_anxious_mood","code_upd2105_apathy","code_upd2106_dopamine_dysregulation_syndrome_features", "mds_updrs_part_ii_summary_score","mds_updrs_part_iii_summary_score","Tremor_Right_UM","Tremor_Left_UM","Tremor_all_Um","PIGD_UM", "ess_summary_score", "moca_total_score", "Abeta", "p-Tau", "Tau", "sbr_caudate_r", "sbr_caudate_l", "sbr_putamen_r", "sbr_putamen_l", "upsit_total_score", "roi1_left_rostral_FA", "roi2_left_middle_FA", "roi3_left_caudal_FA", "roi4_right_rostral_FA", "roi5_right_middle_FA", "roi6_right_caudal_FA", "ref1_left_reference_FA", "ref2_right_reference_FA", "rbd_summary_score", "code_upd2hy_hoehn_and_yahr_stage", "apoe", "mapt", "AGE_ONSET", "mod_schwab_england_pct_adl_score")


PPMI_label <- PPMI_label[, colnames(PPMI_label) %in% c(Cov_severity, "visit_name")]

```



# Pathways selection {#sec:pathway}

## Human MSigDB Collections

#### Pathway-based gene subset selection

Subcollections available in MSigDB:  "MIR:MIR_LEGACY"  "TFT:TFT_LEGACY"  "CGP"             "TFT:GTRD"        ""                "VAX"             "CP:BIOCARTA"     "CGN"             "3CA"             "GO:BP"          "GO:CC"           "IMMUNESIGDB"     "GO:MF"           "HPO"             "CP:KEGG_LEGACY"  "CP:KEGG_MEDICUS" "MIR:MIRDB"       "CM"              "CP:PID"          "CP:REACTOME"    "CP"              "CP:WIKIPATHWAYS"

```{r eval=FALSE}

geneset_filter <- msigdbr(species = "Homo sapiens") %>%
  filter(gs_collection == "C2" & gs_subcollection %in% c("CP:REACTOME"))

geneset_filter$gs_description_ont <- paste(geneset_filter$gs_subcollection, geneset_filter$gs_description,  sep = ":") 

lista_genes <- split(geneset_filter$ensembl_gene, geneset_filter$gs_description_ont)

vector_listas <- lapply(lista_genes, unique)

length(vector_listas)

saveRDS(vector_listas, "Subsets_pathways_Reactome")

```




```{r}

# Example of a pathway
Subsets_pathways[123]

```


# *Clustering and Pairwise Cluster Comparison

Based on the gene subsets obtained in the previous section, the following process will be performed:

- The transcriptomic data will be divided into k clusters using hierarchical clustering.

- All clusters will be compared against each other in a pairwise manner (1 vs 1) to identify significant differences in any of the progression-related covariates. Statistical tests will be applied to each pairwise comparison, and the resulting p-values will be adjusted using the Bonferroni method.

- For each significant difference, the direction of the difference will be assessed. If the difference indicates greater disease progression, a score of +1 will be assigned to the patients in the more severe cluster.

- A final score will be calculated for each patient, obtained by summing the scores resulting from all pairwise comparisons in which the patient belongs to the more severe cluster.


A dataframe will be generated with the following columns:

- Pathway name

- Cluster label and total number of clusters (k) for that iteration

- Number of samples (n) in the cluster

- Name of the significant covariate

- Patient sample ID

- Label of the cluster used as reference in the pairwise comparison

The clinical covariates used to determine patient severity are listed below (*Risk_Var*) and also are included covariates for which higher values indicate lower severity  in *Inv_Var*.

```{r}

# Grouped Tremor & PIGD
Risk_var <- c("mds_updrs_part_i_summary_score","code_upd2101_cognitive_impairment","code_upd2102_hallucinations_and_psychosis","code_upd2103_depressed_mood","code_upd2104_anxious_mood","code_upd2105_apathy","code_upd2106_dopamine_dysregulation_syndrome_features", "mds_updrs_part_ii_summary_score","mds_updrs_part_iii_summary_score","Tremor_Right_UM","Tremor_Left_UM","Tremor_all_Um","PIGD_UM", "ess_summary_score", "moca_total_score", "Abeta", "p-Tau", "Tau", "rbd_summary_score", "code_upd2hy_hoehn_and_yahr_stage", "apoe", "mapt", "AGE_ONSET", "mod_schwab_england_pct_adl_score")

Inv_Var <- c("moca_total_score", "mod_schwab_england_pct_adl_score", "AGE_ONSET")

```


## Severity Score Generation {#sec:score}

```{r}

dividing_data_cluster <- function(df_covariates, df_transcript, Subsets_pathways, n_clust) {
  
  for (pathway in names(Subsets_pathways)) {
    message("Pathway: ", pathway)
    valid_columns <- Subsets_pathways[[pathway]][Subsets_pathways[[pathway]] %in% colnames(df_transcript)]
    
    if (length(valid_columns) < 2) {
      warning("No valid columns found for pathway: ", pathway)
      next
    } 
    
    # Generar el subset transcriptómico
    df_transcript_pathway <- df_transcript[, valid_columns, drop = FALSE]
    
    # Eliminar genes constantes o con todos NA
    is_constant_or_na <- apply(df_transcript_pathway, 2, function(x) all(is.na(x)) || sd(x, na.rm = TRUE) == 0)
    df_transcript_pathway <- df_transcript_pathway[, !is_constant_or_na, drop = FALSE]
    
    # Si quedan menos de 2 genes, saltar el pathway
    if (ncol(df_transcript_pathway) < 2) {
      warning("Not enough valid genes after removing constant/NA genes for pathway: ", pathway)
      next
    }
    
    # Calcular matriz de correlación
    cor.pe <- cor(t(as.matrix(df_transcript_pathway)), method = "pearson")
    
    # Manejar correlaciones perfectas
    cor.pe[cor.pe >= 0.9999] <- 0.9999
    cor.pe[cor.pe <= -0.9999] <- -0.9999
    
    # Calcular matriz de distancias
    DissMatrix <- as.dist(1 - cor.pe)
    
    # Proceder con el clustering
    tryCatch({
      hclust_object <- hclust(DissMatrix, method = "ward.D2")
      cluster_assignments <- cutree(hclust_object, k = n_clust)
      df_covariates$cluster <- cluster_assignments
      
      full_cluster <- unique(df_covariates$cluster)
      
      for (i in 1:(length(full_cluster) - 1)) {
        for (j in (i + 1):length(full_cluster)) {
          
          cluster_i <- df_covariates[cluster_assignments == i, ] 
          cluster_j <- df_covariates[cluster_assignments == j, ]
          
          variables <- setdiff(colnames(cluster_i), "cluster")
          
          for (variable in variables) {
            
            # Si es numérica
            if (is.numeric(df_covariates[[variable]])) {
              
              num_test_result <- wilcox.test(cluster_i[[variable]], cluster_j[[variable]], 
                                             exact = min(length(cluster_i[[variable]]), length(cluster_j[[variable]])) < 20)
              
              num_test_result$p.value <- p.adjust(num_test_result$p.value, method = "bonferroni", 
                                                  n = n_clust * length(variables))
              
              if (!is.na(num_test_result$p.value) && num_test_result$p.value <= 0.05 && variable %in% Risk_var) {
                if (variable %in% Inv_Var) {
                  if (median(cluster_i[[variable]]) > median(cluster_j[[variable]])) {
                    sev_score_mod <- abs(median(cluster_i[[variable]]) - median(cluster_j[[variable]])) / 
                      max(median(cluster_i[[variable]]), median(cluster_j[[variable]]))
                    
                    row <- data.frame(
                      Pathway = rep(pathway, nrow(cluster_j)),
                      Cluster = rep(j, nrow(cluster_j)),
                      k = rep(n_clust, nrow(cluster_j)),
                      n = rep(nrow(cluster_j), nrow(cluster_j)),
                      Covariate = rep(variable, nrow(cluster_j)),
                      sample_id = rownames(cluster_j),
                      p_value = rep(num_test_result$p.value, nrow(cluster_j)),
                      VS = rep(i, nrow(cluster_j)),
                      SevScore = 1,
                      SevScore_mod = sev_score_mod
                    )
                    Sev_score_detail <- rbind(Sev_score_detail, row)
                  }
                } else {
                  sev_score_mod <- abs(median(cluster_i[[variable]]) - median(cluster_j[[variable]])) / 
                    max(median(cluster_i[[variable]]), median(cluster_j[[variable]]))
                  
                  row <- data.frame(
                    Pathway = rep(pathway, nrow(cluster_i)),
                    Cluster = rep(i, nrow(cluster_i)),
                    k = rep(n_clust, nrow(cluster_i)),
                    n = rep(nrow(cluster_i), nrow(cluster_i)),
                    Covariate = rep(variable, nrow(cluster_i)),
                    sample_id = rownames(cluster_i),
                    p_value = rep(num_test_result$p.value, nrow(cluster_i)),
                    VS = rep(j, nrow(cluster_i)),
                    SevScore = 1,
                    SevScore_mod = sev_score_mod
                  )
                  Sev_score_detail <- rbind(Sev_score_detail, row)
                }
              }
              
              # Si es factor
            } else if (is.factor(df_covariates[[variable]])) {
              full_classes <- union(levels(df_covariates[[variable]]), 
                                    unique(c(cluster_i[[variable]], cluster_j[[variable]])))
              full_classes <- sort(as.character(full_classes))
              
              for (upper_class in full_classes) {
                upper_numeric <- as.numeric(upper_class)
                lower_classes <- full_classes[as.numeric(full_classes) < upper_numeric]
                if (length(lower_classes) == 0) next
                
                numerador <- 0
                denominador <- upper_numeric - min(as.numeric(lower_classes))
                
                for (lower_class in lower_classes) {
                  cluster_i_name <- paste0("Cluster_", i)
                  cluster_j_name <- paste0("Cluster_", j)
                  
                  tab <- matrix(0, nrow = 2, ncol = 2,
                                dimnames = list(Clase = c(lower_class, upper_class),
                                                Grupo = c(cluster_i_name, cluster_j_name)))
                  tab[lower_class, cluster_i_name] <- sum(cluster_i[[variable]] == lower_class, na.rm = TRUE)
                  tab[upper_class, cluster_i_name] <- sum(cluster_i[[variable]] == upper_class, na.rm = TRUE)
                  tab[lower_class, cluster_j_name] <- sum(cluster_j[[variable]] == lower_class, na.rm = TRUE)
                  tab[upper_class, cluster_j_name] <- sum(cluster_j[[variable]] == upper_class, na.rm = TRUE)
                  
                  if (all(rowSums(tab) > 0)) {
                    test_to_use <- if (any(chisq.test(tab)$expected < 5)) fisher.test else chisq.test
                    result <- test_to_use(tab)
                    result$p.value <- p.adjust(result$p.value, method = "bonferroni", n = n_clust * length(variables))
                    
                    prop_upper_cluster_i <- tab[upper_class, cluster_i_name] / sum(tab[, cluster_i_name])
                    prop_upper_cluster_j <- tab[upper_class, cluster_j_name] / sum(tab[, cluster_j_name])
                    
                    if (result$p.value <= 0.05) {
                      if (prop_upper_cluster_i > prop_upper_cluster_j) {
                        numerador <- numerador + 1
                        target_cluster <- cluster_i
                        target_index <- i
                        target_vs <- j
                      } else if (prop_upper_cluster_j > prop_upper_cluster_i) {
                        numerador <- numerador + 1
                        target_cluster <- cluster_j
                        target_index <- j
                        target_vs <- i
                      }
                    }
                  }
                }
                
                if (numerador > 0 && denominador > 0) {
                  sev_score_mod <- numerador / denominador
                  row <- data.frame(
                    Pathway = rep(pathway, nrow(target_cluster)),
                    Cluster = rep(target_index, nrow(target_cluster)),
                    k = rep(n_clust, nrow(target_cluster)),
                    n = rep(nrow(target_cluster), nrow(target_cluster)),
                    Covariate = rep(variable, nrow(target_cluster)),
                    sample_id = rownames(target_cluster),
                    p_value = rep(NA, nrow(target_cluster)),
                    VS = rep(target_vs, nrow(target_cluster)),
                    SevScore = rep(1, nrow(target_cluster)),
                    SevScore_mod = rep(sev_score_mod, nrow(target_cluster))
                  )
                  Sev_score_detail <- rbind(Sev_score_detail, row)
                }
              }
            }
            
          }
        }
      }
      
    }, error = function(e) {
      warning("Error in pathway ", pathway, ": ", e$message)
    })
    
    assign("Sev_score_detail", Sev_score_detail, envir = .GlobalEnv)
  }
  
}
  
```

## Set as Categorical Variables (Options)

Clinical covariates representing specific symptoms are set as categorical.
The evolution of their levels over the visits is also displayed in a barplot.

```{r}

# Convert specific variables to factors
cols_to_factor <- c("Tremor_Right_UM", "Tremor_Left_UM", "Tremor_all_Um", "PIGD_UM")
PPMI_label[cols_to_factor] <- lapply(PPMI_label[cols_to_factor], as.factor)

# Verify the conversion
sapply(PPMI_label[cols_to_factor], function(x) is.factor(x))


# Set columns starting with "code" to factors
PPMI_label[, grep("^code", names(PPMI_label))] <- lapply(
  PPMI_label[, grep("^code", names(PPMI_label))],
  as.factor
)

sapply(PPMI_label[colnames(PPMI_label[, grep("^code", names(PPMI_label))])], function(x) is.factor(x) && "0" %in% levels(x))


# Select the factor columns that start with "code_".
factor_vars <- names(PPMI_label)[sapply(PPMI_label, is.factor)] 



# Pivot the data to long format.
PPMI_long_factors <- PPMI_label %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(factor_vars), visit_name) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(factor_vars), names_to = "variable", values_to = "value")


```


## Comprobando variación de las covariables por visita

```{r eval=FALSE}


# --- Separar variables ---
cols <- colnames(PPMI_label)
cols_to_plot <- cols[2:length(cols)]  # desde la segunda a la última columna

# --- Generar gráficos para variables numéricas ---
numeric_vars <- PPMI_label %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(cols_to_plot), visit_name) %>%
  dplyr::select(where(is.numeric), visit_name) %>%
  pivot_longer(-visit_name, names_to = "variable", values_to = "value")

num_vars_list <- unique(numeric_vars$variable)

num_vars_list <- colnames(Covariates_score[, c(Motor, Non_Motor)])

numeric_vars <- Covariates_score %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(c(Motor, Non_Motor)),
               names_to = "variable",
               values_to = "value")

for (var in num_vars_list) {
  df_plot <- numeric_vars %>%
    filter(variable == var) %>%
    group_by(visit_name) %>%
    summarise(desviacion = sd(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
  
  p <- ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = visit_name, y = desviacion, group = 1)) +
    geom_line(color = "steelblue") +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    labs(title = paste("Desviación típica por visita:", var),
         x = "Visita", y = "Desviación típica") +
    theme_minimal()
  
  print(p)
  # ggsave(paste0("varianza_", var, ".png"), plot = p, width = 6, height = 4)
}

# --- Generar gráficos para variables categóricas ---
categorical_vars <- PPMI_label %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(cols_to_plot), visit_name) %>%
  dplyr::select(where(~is.factor(.) || is.character(.)), visit_name) %>%
  pivot_longer(-visit_name, names_to = "variable", values_to = "value")

cat_vars_list <- unique(categorical_vars$variable)

for (var in cat_vars_list) {
  df_plot <- categorical_vars %>%
    filter(variable == var)
  
  p <- ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = fct_infreq(value))) +
    geom_bar(fill = "darkorange") +
    facet_wrap(~ visit_name, scales = "free_x") +
    labs(title = paste("Distribución por visita:", var),
         x = "Categoría", y = "Frecuencia") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
  
  print(p)
  # ggsave(paste0("distribucion_", var, ".png"), plot = p, width = 8, height = 4)
}



```


## Run Severity Score generation

```{r}

PPMI_label_M0 <- PPMI_label %>% filter(visit_name == "M0")
PPMI_label_M0$visit_name <- NULL
PPMI_exp_M0 <- PPMI_exp %>% filter(row.names(.) %in% rownames(PPMI_label_M0))


PPMI_label_M12 <- PPMI_label %>% filter(visit_name == "M12")
PPMI_label_M12$visit_name <- NULL
PPMI_exp_M12 <- PPMI_exp %>% filter(row.names(.) %in% rownames(PPMI_label_M12))


PPMI_label_M24 <- PPMI_label %>% filter(visit_name == "M24")
PPMI_label_M24$visit_name <- NULL
PPMI_exp_M24 <- PPMI_exp %>% filter(row.names(.) %in% rownames(PPMI_label_M24))


PPMI_label_M36 <- PPMI_label %>% filter(visit_name == "M36")
PPMI_label_M36$visit_name <- NULL
PPMI_exp_M36 <- PPMI_exp %>% filter(row.names(.) %in% rownames(PPMI_label_M36))

```



```{r eval=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

Sev_score_detail <- data.frame(
  Pathway = character(),
  Cluster = numeric(),
  k = numeric(),
  n = numeric(),
  Covariate = character(),
  sample_id = character(),
  p_value = numeric(),
  VS = numeric(),
  SevScore = numeric(),
  SevScore_mod = numeric(),
  avg_sil_width = numeric(),
  ch_index = numeric(),
  db_index = numeric() 
)


for (n in 2:14){ 
  (dividing_data_cluster(df_covariates = PPMI_label_M0, df_transcript = PPMI_exp_M0, Subsets_pathways = Subsets_pathways, n_clust = n))
}

Sev_score_detail_M0 <- Sev_score_detail

saveRDS(Sev_score_detail_M0, "Sev_score_detail_M0_noFilter_group_factor_vst_only_protein")



Sev_score_detail <- data.frame(
  Pathway = character(),
  Cluster = numeric(),
  k = numeric(),
  n = numeric(),
  Covariate = character(),
  sample_id = character(),
  p_value = numeric(),
  VS = numeric(),
  SevScore = numeric(),
  SevScore_mod = numeric(),
  avg_sil_width = numeric(),
  ch_index = numeric(),
  db_index = numeric()

)


for (n in 2:14){
  (dividing_data_cluster(df_covariates = PPMI_label_M12, df_transcript = PPMI_exp_M12, Subsets_pathways = Subsets_pathways, n_clust = n))
}

Sev_score_detail_M12 <- Sev_score_detail

saveRDS(Sev_score_detail_M12, "Sev_score_detail_M12_noFilter_group_factor_vst_only_protein")



Sev_score_detail <- data.frame(
  Pathway = character(),
  Cluster = numeric(),
  k = numeric(),
  n = numeric(),
  Covariate = character(),
  sample_id = character(),
  p_value = numeric(),
  VS = numeric(),
  SevScore = numeric(),
  SevScore_mod = numeric(),
  avg_sil_width = numeric(),
  ch_index = numeric(),
  db_index = numeric()

)


for (n in 2:14){
  (dividing_data_cluster(df_covariates = PPMI_label_M24, df_transcript = PPMI_exp_M24, Subsets_pathways = Subsets_pathways, n_clust = n))
}

Sev_score_detail_M24 <- Sev_score_detail

saveRDS(Sev_score_detail_M24, "Sev_score_detail_M24_noFilter_group_factor_vst_only_protein")




Sev_score_detail <- data.frame(
  Pathway = character(),
  Cluster = numeric(),
  k = numeric(),
  n = numeric(),
  Covariate = character(),
  sample_id = character(),
  p_value = numeric(),
  VS = numeric(),
  SevScore = numeric(),
  SevScore_mod = numeric(),
  avg_sil_width = numeric(),
  ch_index = numeric(),
  db_index = numeric() 

)


for (n in 2:14){
  (dividing_data_cluster(df_covariates = PPMI_label_M36, df_transcript = PPMI_exp_M36, Subsets_pathways = Subsets_pathways, n_clust = n))
}

Sev_score_detail_M36 <- Sev_score_detail


saveRDS(Sev_score_detail_M36, "Sev_score_detail_M36_noFilter_group_factor_vst_only_protein")


# saveRDS(Sev_score_detail_M0, "Sev_score_detail_M0_noFilter_group_factor_vst")
# saveRDS(Sev_score_detail_M12, "Sev_score_detail_M12_noFilter_group_factor_vst")
# saveRDS(Sev_score_detail_M24, "Sev_score_detail_M24_noFilter_group_factor_vst")
# saveRDS(Sev_score_detail_M36, "Sev_score_detail_M36_noFilter_group_factor_vst")


```





```{r eval=TRUE}


Sev_score_detail_M0 <- readRDS(file.path(base_dir, "Sev_score_detail_M0_reactome_pathways"))


Sev_score_detail_M12 <- readRDS(file.path(base_dir, "Sev_score_detail_M12_reactome_pathways"))


Sev_score_detail_M24 <- readRDS(file.path(base_dir, "Sev_score_detail_M24_reactome_pathways"))


Sev_score_detail_M36 <- readRDS(file.path(base_dir, "Sev_score_detail_M36_reactome_pathways"))


```


### Random Gene-sets severity score comparison

```{r eval=FALSE}


# Función para contar combinaciones únicas
contar_combinaciones_unicas <- function(df) {
  if (!is.null(df)) {
    df %>%
      distinct(Pathway, Cluster, k, Covariate) %>%
      nrow()
  } else {
    0
  }
}



# Timepoints
timepoints <- c("M0", "M12", "M24", "M36")


# Función mejorada para cargar múltiples iteraciones random
cargar_iteraciones_random <- function(timepoint) {
  # Listar todos los archivos en el directorio
  todos_archivos <- list.files(base_dir, full.names = TRUE)
  
  # Construir el patrón de expresión regular
  patron <- paste0("^Sev_score_detail_", timepoint, "_fake_pathways")
  
  # Filtrar los archivos que coinciden con el patrón
  archivos <- todos_archivos[grepl(patron, basename(todos_archivos))]
  
  if (length(archivos) == 0) {
    warning(paste("No se encontraron archivos para", timepoint, "con patrón:", patron))
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Leer todos los archivos y calcular combinaciones únicas
  resultados <- sapply(archivos, function(archivo) {
    df <- readRDS(archivo)
    contar_combinaciones_unicas(df)
  })
  
  return(resultados)
}

# Cargar datos originales (ajusta estos nombres según tus archivos reales)
datos_originales <- list(
  M0 = Sev_score_detail_M0,
  M12 = Sev_score_detail_M12,
  M24 = Sev_score_detail_M24,
  M36 = Sev_score_detail_M36
)

# Calcular combinaciones únicas para originales
conteo_originales <- sapply(datos_originales, contar_combinaciones_unicas)

# Calcular estadísticas para datos random
estadisticas_random <- lapply(timepoints, function(tp) {
  iteraciones <- cargar_iteraciones_random(tp)
  if (is.null(iteraciones)) return(c(mean = 0, sd = 0, n = 0))
  
  c(
    mean = mean(iteraciones),
    sd = sd(iteraciones),
    n = length(iteraciones)
  )
})

names(estadisticas_random) <- timepoints

# Crear dataframe para ggplot
conteo_largo <- data.frame(
  Timepoint = rep(timepoints, 2),
  Tipo = rep(c("Original", "Random"), each = length(timepoints)),
  Valor = c(conteo_originales, sapply(estadisticas_random, function(x) x["mean"])),
  SD = c(rep(0, length(timepoints)), sapply(estadisticas_random, function(x) x["sd"]))
)

# Gráfico de barras con error bars
p_barras <- ggplot(conteo_largo, aes(x = Timepoint, y = Valor, fill = Tipo)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(), alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = Valor - SD, ymax = Valor + SD),
                position = position_dodge(0.9), width = 0.25) +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(Valor, 1)), 
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), 
            vjust = -0.5, 
            size = 3.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Original" = "#2E86AB", "Random" = "#A23B72"),
                    labels = c("Original" = "PD Gene-Sets", "Random" = "Random Gene-Sets")) +
  labs(title = "Clinical Covariate Signals in Transcriptomic Clusters",
       subtitle = "PD-associated vs. random gene sets comparison",
       x = "Time Point",
       y = "Significant Clinical Signals",
       fill = "") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12),
        axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 11),
        legend.position = "bottom")


# Alternativa en PNG (para revisión)
ggsave("clinical_signals_comparison.png",
       plot = p_barras,
       device = "png",
       width = 8,
       height = 6,
       dpi = 300,
       bg = "white")



# Gráfico de líneas para tendencias
p_lineas <- ggplot(conteo_largo, aes(x = Timepoint, y = Valor, color = Tipo, group = Tipo)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.5) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  # Para los puntos random, añadimos barras de error
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = Valor - SD, ymax = Valor + SD), 
                width = 0.2, 
                alpha = 0.7,
                data = subset(conteo_largo, Tipo == "Random")) +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(Valor, 1)), 
            vjust = -1, 
            size = 3.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Original" = "#2E86AB", "Random" = "#A23B72"),
                    labels = c("Original" = "PD Gene-Sets", "Random" = "Random Gene-Sets")) +
  labs(title = "Clinical Covariate Signals in Transcriptomic Clusters",
       subtitle = "PD-associated vs. random gene sets comparison",
       x = "Time Point",
       y = "Significant Clinical Signals",
       color = "") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 14),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12),
        axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 11),
        legend.position = "bottom")


ggsave("clinical_signals_comparison_lines.png",
       plot = p_lineas,
       device = "png",
       width = 8,
       height = 6,
       dpi = 300,
       bg = "white")


# Mostrar ambos gráficos
print(p_barras)
print(p_lineas)



# Mostrar la tabla de conteos
cat("Combinaciones únicas por timepoint:\n")
print(data.frame(
  Timepoint = timepoints,
  Original = conteo_originales,
  Random_Mean = sapply(estadisticas_random, function(x) x["mean"]),
  Random_SD = sapply(estadisticas_random, function(x) x["sd"]),
  N_Iterations = sapply(estadisticas_random, function(x) x["n"])
))

# Calcular y mostrar estadísticas adicionales
cat("\n--- ESTADÍSTICAS ADICIONALES ---\n")
diferencias <- conteo_originales - sapply(estadisticas_random, function(x) x["mean"])
cat("Diferencia promedio entre Original y Random:", mean(diferencias), "\n")
cat("Porcentaje de diferencia promedio:", mean(diferencias / conteo_originales * 100), "%\n")


# Mostrar resultados en formato Original/Random para cada timepoint
cat("Resultados por timepoint (Original/Random):\n")
for (i in seq_along(timepoints)) {
  random_mean <- round(sapply(estadisticas_random, function(x) x["mean"])[i])
  cat(paste0(timepoints[i], ": ", conteo_originales[i], "/", random_mean, 
             " (Fold: ", round(conteo_originales[i]/random_mean, 2), ")\n"))
}

# Calcular y mostrar el fold change promedio
fold_changes <- conteo_originales / sapply(estadisticas_random, function(x) x["mean"])
cat("\nFold change promedio:", round(mean(fold_changes), 2), "\n")


```


# *Generation of Motor and Non-Motor Severity Components (Options)

Here we calculate the motor and non-motor severity scores based on the signals obtained in the previous section. We begin by generating partial scores (one per covariate), which are then grouped according to the nature of the covariate into motor and non-motor categories.


```{r}
 
create_score_summary <- function(Sev_score_detail_MSigDB, PPMI_label, visit_label) {

  # Convert rownames to the "sample_id" column
  PPMI_label <- PPMI_label %>%
    tibble::rownames_to_column(var = "sample_id")

  # Extract sample_ids and visit_name for the specific visit
  sample_ids_visit <- PPMI_label %>%
    filter(visit_name == visit_label) %>%
    dplyr::select(sample_id, visit_name)

  # ---- Sumar SevScore (original) por sample_id y Covariate ----
  score_orig <- Sev_score_detail_MSigDB %>%
    group_by(sample_id, Covariate) %>%
    summarise(score_sum = sum(SevScore, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    pivot_wider(
      names_from = Covariate,
      values_from = score_sum,
      names_prefix = "Score_",
      values_fill = list(score_sum = 0)
    )

  # ---- Sumar SevScore_mod (modificado) por sample_id y Covariate ----
  score_mod <- Sev_score_detail_MSigDB %>%
    group_by(sample_id, Covariate) %>%
    summarise(score_mod_sum = sum(SevScore_mod, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    pivot_wider(
      names_from = Covariate,
      values_from = score_mod_sum,
      names_prefix = "ScoreMod_",
      values_fill = list(score_mod_sum = 0)
    )

  # ---- Unir ambos y calcular Totales ----
  Sev_score_summary <- full_join(score_orig, score_mod, by = "sample_id") %>%
    rowwise() %>%
    mutate(
      Total_Score = sum(c_across(starts_with("Score_") & !starts_with("ScoreMod_")), na.rm = TRUE),
      Total_ScoreMod = sum(c_across(starts_with("ScoreMod_")), na.rm = TRUE)
    ) %>%
    ungroup()

  # ---- Añadir pacientes sin score y rellenar con ceros ----
  full_score_summary <- sample_ids_visit %>%
    left_join(Sev_score_summary, by = "sample_id") %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~replace_na(., 0)))

  return(full_score_summary)
}




Severity_score_summ_M0 <- create_score_summary(Sev_score_detail_M0, PPMI_label, visit_label = "M0") %>%
  mutate(Visit = 0,
         participant_id = as.numeric(sub("PP-(\\d+)-.*", "\\1", sample_id)))

# Severity_score_summ_M6 <- create_score_summary(Sev_score_detail_M6, PPMI_label, visit_label = "M6") %>%
#   mutate(Visit = 6,
#          participant_id = as.numeric(sub("PP-(\\d+)-.*", "\\1", sample_id)))

Severity_score_summ_M12 <- create_score_summary(Sev_score_detail_M12, PPMI_label, visit_label = "M12") %>%
  mutate(Visit = 12,
         participant_id = as.numeric(sub("PP-(\\d+)-.*", "\\1", sample_id)))

Severity_score_summ_M24 <- create_score_summary(Sev_score_detail_M24, PPMI_label, visit_label = "M24") %>%
  mutate(Visit = 24,
         participant_id = as.numeric(sub("PP-(\\d+)-.*", "\\1", sample_id)))

Severity_score_summ_M36 <- create_score_summary(Sev_score_detail_M36, PPMI_label, visit_label = "M36") %>%
  mutate(Visit = 36,
         participant_id = as.numeric(sub("PP-(\\d+)-.*", "\\1", sample_id)))


list_of_scores <- list(Severity_score_summ_M0, 
                       Severity_score_summ_M12, 
                       Severity_score_summ_M24, 
                       Severity_score_summ_M36)



# Use reduce to combine the dataframes with full_join.
combined_severity_score <- purrr::reduce(list_of_scores, 
                                  full_join)



# Replace NA with 0 for all scores.
combined_severity_score[is.na(combined_severity_score)] <- 0


Motor <- c("code_upd2hy_hoehn_and_yahr_stage", 
           "mds_updrs_part_ii_summary_score",
           "mds_updrs_part_iii_summary_score", 
           "Tremor_Right_UM", 
           "Tremor_Left_UM",
           "Tremor_all_Um", 
           "PIGD_UM",
           "mod_schwab_england_pct_adl_score")

Non_Motor <- c("code_upd2106_dopamine_dysregulation_syndrome_features",
               "mds_updrs_part_i_summary_score", 
               "code_upd2102_hallucinations_and_psychosis",
               "code_upd2101_cognitive_impairment", 
               "code_upd2103_depressed_mood",
               "code_upd2104_anxious_mood", 
               "code_upd2105_apathy",
               "rbd_summary_score", 
               "ess_summary_score",
               "moca_total_score")

Non_Motor_Overall <- "mds_updrs_part_i_summary_score"

Cognitive <- c("code_upd2101_cognitive_impairment", 
               "moca_total_score")


Neuro <- c("code_upd2106_dopamine_dysregulation_syndrome_features",
           "code_upd2102_hallucinations_and_psychosis",
           "code_upd2101_cognitive_impairment", 
           "code_upd2103_depressed_mood",
           "code_upd2104_anxious_mood", 
           "code_upd2105_apathy")


Neuro_Cogn <- c(Cognitive, Neuro)


Sleep <- c("rbd_summary_score", 
           "ess_summary_score")


Motor_mod <- paste0("ScoreMod_", Motor)
Motor_raw <- paste0("Score_", Motor)

Non_Motor_mod <- paste0("ScoreMod_", Non_Motor)
Non_Motor_raw <- paste0("Score_", Non_Motor)

Cognitive_mod <- paste0("ScoreMod_", Cognitive)
Cognitive_raw <- paste0("Score_", Cognitive)

Neuro_mod <- paste0("ScoreMod_", Neuro)
Neuro_raw <- paste0("Score_", Neuro)

Neuro_Cogn_mod <- paste0("ScoreMod_", Neuro_Cogn)
Neuro_Cogn_raw <- paste0("Score_", Neuro_Cogn)

Sleep_mod <- paste0("ScoreMod_", Sleep)
Sleep_raw <- paste0("Score_", Sleep)

Non_Motor_Overall_mod <- paste0("ScoreMod_", Non_Motor_Overall)
Non_Motor_Overall_raw <- paste0("Score_", Non_Motor_Overall)



# Modificar la creación de scores para incluir las nuevas subdivisiones
combined_severity_score_all_visits <- combined_severity_score %>%
  mutate(
    Motor_Score_mod = rowSums(dplyr::select(., any_of(Motor_mod)), na.rm = TRUE),
    Motor_Score_raw = rowSums(dplyr::select(., any_of(Motor_raw)), na.rm = TRUE),
    Non_Motor_Score_mod = rowSums(dplyr::select(., any_of(Non_Motor_mod)), na.rm = TRUE),
    Non_Motor_Score_raw = rowSums(dplyr::select(., any_of(Non_Motor_raw)), na.rm = TRUE),
    # Nuevas subdivisiones
    Cognitive_Score_mod = rowSums(dplyr::select(., any_of(Cognitive_mod)), na.rm = TRUE),
    Cognitive_Score_raw = rowSums(dplyr::select(., any_of(Cognitive_raw)), na.rm = TRUE),
    Neuro_Score_mod = rowSums(dplyr::select(., any_of(Neuro_mod)), na.rm = TRUE),
    Neuro_Score_raw = rowSums(dplyr::select(., any_of(Neuro_raw)), na.rm = TRUE),
    Neuro_Cogn_Score_mod = rowSums(dplyr::select(., any_of(Neuro_Cogn_mod)), na.rm = TRUE),
    Neuro_Cogn_Score_raw = rowSums(dplyr::select(., any_of(Neuro_Cogn_raw)), na.rm = TRUE),
    Sleep_Score_mod = rowSums(dplyr::select(., any_of(Sleep_mod)), na.rm = TRUE),
    Sleep_Score_raw = rowSums(dplyr::select(., any_of(Sleep_raw)), na.rm = TRUE),
    Non_Motor_Overall_Score_mod = rowSums(dplyr::select(., any_of(Non_Motor_Overall_mod)), na.rm = TRUE),
    Non_Motor_Overall_Score_raw = rowSums(dplyr::select(., any_of(Non_Motor_Overall_raw)), na.rm = TRUE)
  )




# Generate columns for cumulative scores (to adress progression).
combined_severity_score_all_visits_acc <- combined_severity_score_all_visits %>%
  arrange(participant_id, Visit) %>%
  group_by(participant_id) %>%
  mutate(across(
    -c(Visit, sample_id, visit_name), # Exclude participant_id and Visit.
    cumsum, # Apply cumsum
    .names = "{.col}_Cumulative" # Create names for the cumulative columns.
  )) %>%
  ungroup()



Covariates <- as.data.frame(readRDS(file.path(base_dir, "metadata_reduced", "PPMI_covariates_extra")))
rownames(Covariates) <- Covariates$sample_id

# Add Ana Luisa’s covariates
cna <- readRDS(file.path(base_dir, "Pipeline", "Covariates_new_all"))

Covariates <- Covariates %>%
  left_join(cna %>% dplyr::select(sample_id, AGE_ONSET, prognosis_status, apoe, mapt, dementia_status, MOCA_Status), by = "sample_id")


Covariates <- Covariates %>%
  group_by(participant_id) %>%
  fill(AGE_ONSET, prognosis_status, apoe, mapt, .direction = "downup") %>%
  ungroup()



common_patients <- unique(combined_severity_score_all_visits$participant_id)
common_patients_id <- paste("PP-", common_patients, sep = "")


Covariates_filtered <- Covariates %>% 
  filter(participant_id %in% common_patients_id & visit_name != "M6") %>%
  mutate(Visit = as.numeric(str_extract(visit_name, "\\d+")))




# Unir todas las nuevas variables de score
score_columns <- c(
  "Motor_Score_mod", "Motor_Score_raw", 
  "Non_Motor_Score_mod", "Non_Motor_Score_raw",
  "Cognitive_Score_mod", "Cognitive_Score_raw",
  "Neuro_Score_mod", "Neuro_Score_raw",
  "Neuro_Cogn_Score_mod", "Neuro_Cogn_Score_raw",
  "Sleep_Score_mod", "Sleep_Score_raw",
  "Non_Motor_Overall_Score_mod", "Non_Motor_Overall_Score_raw",
  paste0(c(
    "Motor_Score_mod", "Motor_Score_raw", 
    "Non_Motor_Score_mod", "Non_Motor_Score_raw",
    "Cognitive_Score_mod", "Cognitive_Score_raw",
    "Neuro_Score_mod", "Neuro_Score_raw",
    "Neuro_Cogn_Score_mod", "Neuro_Cogn_Score_raw",
    "Sleep_Score_mod", "Sleep_Score_raw",
    "Non_Motor_Overall_Score_mod", "Non_Motor_Overall_Score_raw"
  ), "_Cumulative")
)

Covariates_score <- Covariates_filtered %>%
  left_join(combined_severity_score_all_visits_acc %>% 
            dplyr::select("sample_id", all_of(score_columns)), 
            by = "sample_id")


summary(Covariates_score[, c("participant_id", "visit_name", score_columns)])

```





## *Visualization of Clinical Signal Results

Bar plots represent the percentage contribution of each covariate within the signal set.

The percentage of signals for each visit is displayed, helping to more clearly distinguish the differences within visits. The absolute value of the severity score per covariate is also shown.

Finally, the percentage of total signals across all visits is presented, allowing for the identification of the most important clinical covariates overall.


```{r}

# Función para calcular el número de señales por covariable y visita
calcular_señales_por_visita <- function(lista_datos, nombres_visitas) {
  señales_visitas <- list()
  
  for (i in seq_along(lista_datos)) {
    datos_visita <- lista_datos[[i]]
    visita <- nombres_visitas[i]
    
    señales <- datos_visita %>%
      distinct(Pathway, Covariate, Cluster, k) %>%
      group_by(Covariate) %>%
      summarise(Value = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
      mutate(Visit = visita)
    
    señales_visitas[[i]] <- señales
  }
  
  return(bind_rows(señales_visitas))
}

# Función para crear el gráfico de barras
crear_grafico_barras_señales <- function(data_completo, tipo_covariables, 
                                        color_palette = NULL, titulo = "") {
  
  # Filtrar por tipo de covariables
  if (tipo_covariables == "Motor") {
    data_filtrado <- data_completo %>% filter(Covariate %in% Motor)
  } else if (tipo_covariables == "Non-Motor") {
    data_filtrado <- data_completo %>% filter(Covariate %in% Non_Motor)
  } else {
    stop("tipo_covariables debe ser 'Motor' o 'Non-Motor'")
  }
  
  # Crear paleta de colores si no se proporciona
  if (is.null(color_palette)) {
    n_colores <- length(unique(data_filtrado$Covariate))
    color_palette <- scales::hue_pal()(n_colores)
    names(color_palette) <- unique(data_filtrado$Covariate)
  }
  
  # Crear el gráfico
  p <- ggplot(data_filtrado, aes(x = as.factor(Visit), y = Value, fill = Covariate)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.7) +
    labs(
      title = titulo,
      x = "Visit",
      y = "Number of Signals",
      fill = "Covariate"
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_blank(),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
      panel.spacing = unit(1, "lines")
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = color_palette) +
    geom_text(
      aes(label = Value),
      position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
      vjust = -0.3,
      size = 3
    ) +
    ylim(0, max(data_filtrado$Value) * 1.1) # Ajustar límites para las etiquetas
  
  return(p)
}

# Preparar los datos para todas las visitas
lista_datos_visitas <- list(
  Sev_score_detail_M0,
  Sev_score_detail_M12, 
  Sev_score_detail_M24,
  Sev_score_detail_M36
)


nombres_visitas <- c("M0", "M12", "M24", "M36")

# Calcular señales para todas las visitas
señales_todas_visitas <- calcular_señales_por_visita(lista_datos_visitas, nombres_visitas)

# Crear los gráficos
p_motor <- crear_grafico_barras_señales(
  data_completo = señales_todas_visitas,
  tipo_covariables = "Motor",
  titulo = "Number of Signals per Motor Covariate across Visits"
)

p_non_motor <- crear_grafico_barras_señales(
  data_completo = señales_todas_visitas,
  tipo_covariables = "Non-Motor", 
  titulo = "Number of Signals per Non-Motor Covariate across Visits"
)

# Mostrar los gráficos
print(p_motor)
print(p_non_motor)

# 
# ggsave("motor_signals_reactome.png", plot = p_motor, width = 15, height = 7, dpi = 300)
# ggsave("non_motor_signals_reactome.png", plot = p_non_motor, width = 15, height = 7, dpi = 300)
# 

```

### MOTOR y NON-MOTOR

## Visualization of Pathway results

### Heatmap pdf all pathways-covariates

```{r}

generar_heatmap_señales <- function(data_input, titulo = "Heatmap de Señales por Pathway y Covariable") {
  
  # Calcular el número de señales únicas por Pathway y Covariate
  señales_unicas <- data_input %>%
    distinct(Pathway, Covariate, Cluster, k) %>%
    group_by(Pathway, Covariate) %>%
    summarise(n_señales = n(), .groups = "drop")
  
  # Crear matriz para el heatmap
  heatmap_data <- señales_unicas %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = Covariate, values_from = n_señales, values_fill = 0) %>%
    column_to_rownames("Pathway") %>%
    as.matrix()
  
  # Crear el heatmap (silent=TRUE para capturarlo en objeto)
  heatmap_plot <- pheatmap::pheatmap(
    heatmap_data,
    main = titulo,
    color = colorRampPalette(c("white", "darkolivegreen4", "darkolivegreen"))(50),
    cluster_rows = TRUE,
    cluster_cols = TRUE,
    clustering_distance_rows = "euclidean",
    clustering_distance_cols = "euclidean",
    clustering_method = "complete",
    display_numbers = TRUE,
    number_color = "black",
    fontsize_number = 8,
    fontsize_row = 8,
    fontsize_col = 8,
    angle_col = 45,
    silent = TRUE
  )
  
  # Forzar el dibujo en pantalla
  grid::grid.newpage()
  grid::grid.draw(heatmap_plot$gtable)
  
  return(heatmap_plot)
}

# Función para filtrar por tipo de covariable (Motor/Non-Motor)
generar_heatmap_filtrado <- function(data_input, tipo = "Motor", tiempo = "M0") {
  
  if (tipo == "Motor") {
    datos_filtrados <- data_input %>% filter(!Covariate %in% Non_Motor)
  } else if (tipo == "Non-Motor") {
    datos_filtrados <- data_input %>% filter(!Covariate %in% Motor)
  } else {
    stop("El tipo debe ser 'Motor' o 'Non-Motor'")
  }
  
  titulo <- paste(tipo, "Covariate detection in", tiempo, "clustering")
  
  return(generar_heatmap_señales(datos_filtrados, titulo))
}

# Generar los heatmaps para cada tiempo y tipo
# M0
heatmap_M0_M <- generar_heatmap_filtrado(Sev_score_detail_M0, "Motor", "M0")
heatmap_M0_NM <- generar_heatmap_filtrado(Sev_score_detail_M0, "Non-Motor", "M0")

# ggsave("heatmap_M0_M.png", plot = heatmap_M0_M$gtable, width = 25, height = 15)
# ggsave("heatmap_M0_NM.png", plot = heatmap_M0_NM$gtable, width = 25, height = 15)

# M12
heatmap_M12_M <- generar_heatmap_filtrado(Sev_score_detail_M12, "Motor", "M12")
heatmap_M12_NM <- generar_heatmap_filtrado(Sev_score_detail_M12, "Non-Motor", "M12")

# ggsave("heatmap_M12_M.png", plot = heatmap_M12_M$gtable, width = 25, height = 15)
# ggsave("heatmap_M12_NM.png", plot = heatmap_M12_NM$gtable, width = 25, height = 15)

# M24
heatmap_M24_M <- generar_heatmap_filtrado(Sev_score_detail_M24, "Motor", "M24")
heatmap_M24_NM <- generar_heatmap_filtrado(Sev_score_detail_M24, "Non-Motor", "M24")

# ggsave("heatmap_M24_M.png", plot = heatmap_M24_M$gtable, width = 25, height = 15)
# ggsave("heatmap_M24_NM.png", plot = heatmap_M24_NM$gtable, width = 25, height = 15)

# M36
heatmap_M36_M <- generar_heatmap_filtrado(Sev_score_detail_M36, "Motor", "M36")
heatmap_M36_NM <- generar_heatmap_filtrado(Sev_score_detail_M36, "Non-Motor", "M36")

# ggsave("heatmap_M36_M.png", plot = heatmap_M36_M$gtable, width = 25, height = 15)
# ggsave("heatmap_M36_NM.png", plot = heatmap_M36_NM$gtable, width = 25, height = 15)



# Abrir un PDF multipágina
pdf("heatmaps_todos_reactome.pdf", width = 25, height = 25)

# Dibujar cada heatmap en una página distinta
grid::grid.draw(heatmap_M0_M$gtable)
grid::grid.newpage()

grid::grid.draw(heatmap_M0_NM$gtable)
grid::grid.newpage()

grid::grid.draw(heatmap_M12_M$gtable)
grid::grid.newpage()

grid::grid.draw(heatmap_M12_NM$gtable)
grid::grid.newpage()

grid::grid.draw(heatmap_M24_M$gtable)
grid::grid.newpage()

grid::grid.draw(heatmap_M24_NM$gtable)
grid::grid.newpage()

grid::grid.draw(heatmap_M36_M$gtable)
grid::grid.newpage()

grid::grid.draw(heatmap_M36_NM$gtable)

# Cerrar el PDF
dev.off()


```


# ***Validando el severity score como proxy para la severidad clínica de la enfermedad.

## Score ~ All Covs

### Figure R3

```{r}

# =============================================================================
# ANÁLISIS MULTIVARIABLE UNIFICADO - MODELOS LINEALES
# =============================================================================

# Función principal: análisis multivariable con modelos lineales
analisis_multivariable_lm <- function(Covariates_score, 
                                     score_col = "Motor_Score_mod_Cumulative", 
                                     visitas = c("M0", "M12", "M24", "M36"),
                                     vars_covariables = NULL,
                                     alpha = 0.05,
                                     cohort_name = "training") {
  
  # Cargar librerías necesarias
  if (!require(dplyr)) install.packages("dplyr")
  if (!require(broom)) install.packages("broom")
  library(dplyr)
  library(broom)
  
  if (is.null(vars_covariables)) {
    vars_covariables <- names(Covariates_score) %>%
      intersect(names(Covariates_score)[sapply(Covariates_score, is.numeric)]) %>%
      setdiff(c(score_col, "visit", "visit_name", "participant_id", "Order"))
  }
  
  # Lista para almacenar resultados
  results <- list()
  models <- list()
  model_data <- list()
  training_predictions <- list()
  
  for (v in visitas) {
    # Filtrar datos para la visita actual
    df_visit <- Covariates_score %>% 
      filter(visit_name == v) %>%
      dplyr::select(all_of(c(score_col, "participant_id", vars_covariables))) %>%
      na.omit()
    
    # Verificar que hay suficientes datos
    if (nrow(df_visit) < length(vars_covariables) + 10) {
      message(paste("No hay suficientes datos para la visita", v, "- omitiendo"))
      next
    }
    
    # Crear fórmula con todas las covariables
    formula_str <- paste(score_col, "~", paste(vars_covariables, collapse = " + "))
    formula_obj <- as.formula(formula_str)
    
    # Entrenar modelo lineal múltiple
    modelo <- lm(formula_obj, data = df_visit)
    
    # Predecir sobre los datos de entrenamiento
    train_pred <- predict(modelo, newdata = df_visit, se.fit = TRUE)
    
    # Almacenar predicciones de entrenamiento
    training_predictions[[v]] <- data.frame(
      participant_id = df_visit$participant_id,
      visit = v,
      cohort = cohort_name,
      actual_score = df_visit[[score_col]],
      predicted_score = train_pred$fit,
      se_fit = train_pred$se.fit,
      df = train_pred$df,
      residual_scale = train_pred$residual.scale,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
    # Resumen del modelo
    summ <- summary(modelo)
    
    # Extraer coeficientes y estadísticas
    coef_df <- broom::tidy(modelo) %>%
      filter(term != "(Intercept)") %>%
      mutate(
        visit = v,
        significant = p.value < alpha,
        term = gsub("`", "", term)
      )
    
    # Almacenar resultados
    results[[v]] <- list(
      visit = v,
      n_observations = nrow(df_visit),
      r_squared = summ$r.squared,
      adj_r_squared = summ$adj.r.squared,
      f_statistic = summ$fstatistic[1],
      f_pvalue = pf(summ$fstatistic[1], summ$fstatistic[2], summ$fstatistic[3], lower.tail = FALSE),
      coefficients = coef_df
    )
    
    models[[v]] <- modelo
    model_data[[v]] <- df_visit
  }
  
  # Combinar todos los coeficientes en un solo dataframe
  all_coefficients <- bind_rows(lapply(results, function(x) x$coefficients))
  all_training_predictions <- bind_rows(training_predictions)
  
  # Crear resumen por visita
  summary_df <- data.frame(
    visit = sapply(results, function(x) x$visit),
    n_obs = sapply(results, function(x) x$n_observations),
    r_squared = sapply(results, function(x) x$r_squared),
    adj_r_squared = sapply(results, function(x) x$adj_r_squared),
    f_statistic = sapply(results, function(x) x$f_statistic),
    f_pvalue = sapply(results, function(x) x$f_pvalue),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  return(list(
    models = models,               # Modelos completos por visita
    model_data = model_data,       # Datos usados para entrenar cada modelo
    training_predictions = all_training_predictions, # Predicciones en cohorte de entrenamiento
    summary = summary_df,          # Resumen estadístico
    coefficients = all_coefficients, # Coeficientes detallados
    detailed_results = results,    # Resultados completos por visita
    formula = formula_str,         # Fórmula utilizada
    variables = vars_covariables,  # Variables predictoras
    target = score_col,            # Variable objetivo
    cohort_name = cohort_name      # Nombre de la cohorte de entrenamiento
  ))
}

# =============================================================================
# FUNCIONES DE VISUALIZACIÓN
# =============================================================================

# Función para graficar coeficientes con puntos
plot_coefficients <- function(resultados) {
  if (!require(ggplot2)) install.packages("ggplot2")
  if (!require(dplyr)) install.packages("dplyr")
  library(ggplot2)
  library(dplyr)
  
  coef_data <- resultados$coefficients
  
  ggplot(coef_data, aes(x = estimate, y = term, color = significant)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    facet_grid(visit ~ ., scales = "free_y") +
    labs(title = "Linear model coefficients per visit",
         x = "Value",
         y = "Clinical covariates",
         color = "P-Value < 0.05") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 5),  # Tamaño reducido para variables del eje Y
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9),  # Tamaño para eje X
      strip.text = element_text(size = 10)   # Tamaño para títulos de facetas
    )
}

# Función para graficar coeficientes con heatmap
plot_coefficients_heatmap <- function(resultados) {
  if (!require(ggplot2)) install.packages("ggplot2")
  if (!require(dplyr)) install.packages("dplyr")
  library(ggplot2)
  library(dplyr)
  
  coef_data <- resultados$coefficients %>%
    mutate(
      # Añadir asteriscos según nivel de significancia
      significance_stars = case_when(
        p.value < 0.001 ~ "***",
        p.value < 0.01 ~ "**",
        p.value < 0.05 ~ "*",
        p.value < 0.1 ~ ".",
        TRUE ~ ""
      ),
      # Crear etiqueta con coeficiente y asteriscos
      label = sprintf("%.3f%s", estimate, significance_stars)
    )
  
  ggplot(coef_data, aes(x = visit, y = term, fill = estimate)) +
    geom_tile(color = "white") +
    scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", high = "red", mid = "white", 
                         midpoint = 0, name = "Coefficients") +
    geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3) +
    labs(title = "Coefficients per visit",
         x = NULL, y = "Clinical covariates") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      plot.caption = element_text(size = 9, hjust = 0, face = "italic")
    )
}

# =============================================================================
# ANÁLISIS PARA COHORTES GENÉTICAS Y CONTROLES SANOS - MOTOR Y NO MOTOR
# =============================================================================

# Diccionario de nombres de covariables
covariate_labels <- c(
  # --- Motor ---
  "code_upd2hy_hoehn_and_yahr_stage" = "Hoehn & Yahr Stage",
  "mds_updrs_part_ii_summary_score" = "MDS-UPDRS-II",
  "mds_updrs_part_iii_summary_score" = "MDS-UPDRS-III",
  "Tremor_Right_UM" = "Right Tremor",
  "Tremor_Left_UM" = "Left Tremor",
  "Tremor_all_Um" = "Overall Tremor",
  "PIGD_UM" = "PIGD",
  "mod_schwab_england_pct_adl_score" = "Schwab & England ADL",
  
  # --- Non-Motor ---
  "code_upd2106_dopamine_dysregulation_syndrome_features" = "DDS",
  "mds_updrs_part_i_summary_score" = "MDS-UPDRS-I",
  "code_upd2102_hallucinations_and_psychosis" = "Hallucinations & Psychosis",
  "code_upd2101_cognitive_impairment" = "Cognitive Impairment",
  "code_upd2103_depressed_mood" = "Depressed Mood",
  "code_upd2104_anxious_mood" = "Anxious Mood",
  "code_upd2105_apathy" = "Apathy",
  "rbd_summary_score" = "RBD",
  "ess_summary_score" = "ESS",
  "moca_total_score" = "MoCA Score"
)

# Función para ejecutar análisis completo de motor
ejecutar_analisis_motor <- function(Covariates_score, Motor_vars, Non_Motor_vars) {
  # Entrenar el modelo con la cohorte principal
  resultados_modelo <- analisis_multivariable_lm(
    Covariates_score, 
    score_col = "Motor_Score_raw",
    vars_covariables = c(Motor_vars, Non_Motor_vars),
    cohort_name = "PPMI - Sporadic"
  )
  
  # Generar gráficos
  plot_motor <- plot_coefficients(resultados_modelo)
  heatmap_motor <- plot_coefficients_heatmap(resultados_modelo)
  
  # Mostrar R² ajustado
  cat("Motor Score - R² ajustado por visita:\n")
  print(resultados_modelo$summary$adj_r_squared)
  
  return(list(
    resultados = resultados_modelo,
    plot = plot_motor,
    heatmap = heatmap_motor
  ))
}

# Función para ejecutar análisis completo de no motor
ejecutar_analisis_non_motor <- function(Covariates_score, Non_Motor_vars, Motor_vars) {
  # Entrenar el modelo con la cohorte principal
  resultados_modelo <- analisis_multivariable_lm(
    Covariates_score, 
    score_col = "Non_Motor_Score_raw",
    vars_covariables = c(Non_Motor_vars, Motor_vars),
    cohort_name = "PPMI - Sporadic"
  )
  
  # Generar gráficos
  plot_non_motor <- plot_coefficients(resultados_modelo)
  heatmap_non_motor <- plot_coefficients_heatmap(resultados_modelo)
  
  # Mostrar R² ajustado
  cat("Non-Motor Score - R² ajustado por visita:\n")
  print(resultados_modelo$summary$adj_r_squared)
  
  return(list(
    resultados = resultados_modelo,
    plot = plot_non_motor,
    heatmap = heatmap_non_motor
  ))
}

# Función para crear figura combinada (Figure R3)
crear_figura_combinada <- function(analisis_motor, analisis_non_motor, guardar = TRUE) {
  if (!require(ggplot2)) install.packages("ggplot2")
  if (!require(ggpubr)) install.packages("ggpubr")
  library(ggplot2)
  library(ggpubr)
  
  # Extraer heatmaps
  heatmap_motor <- analisis_motor$heatmap
  heatmap_non_motor <- analisis_non_motor$heatmap
  
  # Renombrar eje Y según diccionario
  heatmap_motor$data$term <- covariate_labels[heatmap_motor$data$term]
  heatmap_non_motor$data$term <- covariate_labels[heatmap_non_motor$data$term]
  
  # Eliminar asteriscos de significancia
  heatmap_motor$data$significance_stars <- ""
  heatmap_non_motor$data$significance_stars <- ""
  
  # Ajustar títulos y ejes
  heatmap_motor <- heatmap_motor +
    labs(title = "Motor") +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title.y = element_blank(),          # Eliminar título eje Y
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0),
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(),      # Eliminar líneas de cuadrícula principales
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank()       # Eliminar líneas de cuadrícula secundarias
    )
  
  heatmap_non_motor <- heatmap_non_motor +
    labs(title = "Non-Motor") +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold"),  # Solo título eje Y aquí
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0),
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(),      # Eliminar líneas de cuadrícula principales
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank()       # Eliminar líneas de cuadrícula secundarias
    )
  
  # Guardar p-values por separado
  Motor_significance <- heatmap_motor$data$p.value
  NonMotor_significance <- heatmap_non_motor$data$p.value
  
  # Combinar heatmaps
  Figure_R3 <- ggarrange(
    heatmap_non_motor, heatmap_motor, 
    ncol = 2, nrow = 1,
    common.legend = FALSE,
    legend = "right",
    labels = NULL
  )
  
  # Agregar título de eje X compartido
  Figure_R3 <- annotate_figure(Figure_R3,
                               bottom = text_grob("Visit", face = "bold", size = 14))
  
  # Guardar si se solicita
  if (guardar) {
    ggsave("Figure_R3.png", Figure_R3, width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 300)
    
    # Guardar objetos para portar
    save(heatmap_motor, heatmap_non_motor,
         Motor_significance, NonMotor_significance,
         file = "Figure_R3_objects_R1.RData")
  }
  
  return(list(
    figura = Figure_R3,
    pvalues_motor = Motor_significance,
    pvalues_non_motor = NonMotor_significance
  ))
}

# =============================================================================
# EJECUCIÓN PRINCIPAL
# =============================================================================

# Ejemplo de uso completo:
# 
# # Ejecutar análisis
analisis_motor <- ejecutar_analisis_motor(Covariates_score, Motor, Non_Motor)
analisis_non_motor <- ejecutar_analisis_non_motor(Covariates_score, Non_Motor, Motor)
# 
# # Crear figura combinada
figura_resultados <- crear_figura_combinada(analisis_motor, analisis_non_motor)


```


### Figure R5

```{r}

# =============================================================================
# PREDICCIÓN EN COHORTES GENÉTICAS Y CONTROLES SANOS
# =============================================================================

# Función para preparar datos de cohortes genéticas
preparar_datos_cohortes_geneticas <- function(base_dir, cohortes_interes = NULL, diagnosticos = NULL) {
  
  # Cargar librerías necesarias
  if (!require(dplyr)) install.packages("dplyr")
  library(dplyr)
  
  # Cargar datos
  Covariates_p <- as.data.frame(readRDS(file.path(base_dir, "metadata_reduced", "PPMI_covariates_extra")))
  
  # Configuración por defecto
  if (is.null(cohortes_interes)) {
    cohortes_interes <- c("Healthy Control", "GBA - Aff", "LRRK2 - Aff", "LRRK2 - Unaff", 
                         "SNCA - Aff", "SNCA - Unaff", "GBA - Unaff")
  }
  
  if (is.null(diagnosticos)) {
    diagnosticos <- c("Case", "Control")
  }
  
  # Procesar datos de mutación
  Covariates_p <- Covariates_p %>%
    group_by(participant_id) %>%
    mutate(mutation = ifelse(all(is.na(mutation)), NA, first(na.omit(mutation)))) %>%
    ungroup()
  
  # Filtrar datos según condiciones
  Covariates_p <- Covariates_p %>%
    filter(case_control_other_latest %in% diagnosticos &
           mutation %in% cohortes_interes)
  
  # Estadísticas de visitas por mutación
  stats_visitas <- Covariates_p %>%
    filter(!is.na(mutation)) %>%
    group_by(mutation) %>%
    summarise(visitas = paste(unique(visit_name), collapse = ", "),
              n = n()) %>%
    arrange(mutation)
  
  print("Estadísticas de visitas por cohorte:")
  print(stats_visitas)
  
  return(Covariates_p)
}

# Función para configurar cohortes de predicción
configurar_cohortes_prediccion <- function(datos, cohorte_referencia = "PPMI - Sporadic", 
                                          cohortes_objetivo = NULL) {
  
  if (is.null(cohortes_objetivo)) {
    cohortes_objetivo <- c("Healthy Control", "GBA - Aff", "LRRK2 - Aff", "SNCA - Aff")
  }
  
  # Normalizar nombres de cohortes
  datos_procesados <- datos %>%
    mutate(mutation = case_when(
      mutation == "Sporadic" ~ cohorte_referencia,
      TRUE ~ mutation
    ))
  
  # Filtrar datos de interés
  datos_filtrados <- datos_procesados %>%
    filter(mutation %in% c(cohortes_objetivo, cohorte_referencia))
  
  return(list(
    datos = datos_filtrados,
    cohorte_referencia = cohorte_referencia,
    cohortes_objetivo = cohortes_objetivo
  ))
}

# Función para predecir sobre nueva cohorte
predecir_sobre_cohorte <- function(modelo_resultado, nueva_cohorte, 
                                  cohort_name = "test", visitas = NULL,
                                  max_na_percent = 10) {
  
  if (!require(dplyr)) install.packages("dplyr")
  library(dplyr)
  
  if (is.null(visitas)) {
    visitas <- names(modelo_resultado$models)
  }
  
  predictions <- list()
  
  # Función para calcular porcentaje de NAs
  percent_na <- function(df) {
    colMeans(is.na(df)) * 100
  }
  
  # Función para calcular la moda
  calculate_mode <- function(x) {
    ux <- unique(na.omit(x))
    if (length(ux) == 0) return(NA)
    ux[which.max(tabulate(match(x, ux)))]
  }
  
  for (v in visitas) {
    # Verificar si existe modelo para esta visita
    if (!v %in% names(modelo_resultado$models)) {
      message(paste("No hay modelo para la visita", v, "- omitiendo"))
      next
    }
    
    modelo_original <- modelo_resultado$models[[v]]
    
    # Filtrar datos de la nueva cohorte para esta visita
    df_visit_nueva <- nueva_cohorte %>%
      filter(visit_name == v) %>%
      dplyr::select(all_of(c("participant_id", modelo_resultado$variables))) 
    
    # 1. Identificar variables con muchos NAs en los nuevos datos
    na_percent <- percent_na(df_visit_nueva)
    vars_con_muchos_nas <- names(na_percent[na_percent > max_na_percent])
    
    # Variables disponibles para predecir (excluyendo las problemáticas)
    variables_disponibles <- setdiff(modelo_resultado$variables, vars_con_muchos_nas)
    
    if (length(vars_con_muchos_nas) > 0) {
      message(paste("Visita", v, ": Variables excluidas por >", max_na_percent, "% NAs:", 
                   paste(vars_con_muchos_nas, collapse = ", ")))
      message(paste("Visita", v, ": Variables disponibles:", length(variables_disponibles), "de", 
                   length(modelo_resultado$variables)))
    }
    
    # Verificar que tenemos al menos algunas variables para predecir
    if (length(variables_disponibles) == 0) {
      warning(paste("Visita", v, ": No hay variables disponibles después de excluir las con muchos NAs"))
      next
    }
    
    # 2. Reentrenar modelo solo con variables disponibles
    # Obtener datos de entrenamiento originales
    datos_entrenamiento <- modelo_resultado$model_data[[v]]
    
    # Filtrar solo variables disponibles
    datos_entrenamiento_adaptado <- datos_entrenamiento %>%
      dplyr::select(all_of(c(modelo_resultado$target, variables_disponibles))) %>%
      na.omit()
    
    # Reentrenar modelo
    formula_adaptada <- as.formula(paste(modelo_resultado$target, "~", 
                                        paste(variables_disponibles, collapse = " + ")))
    
    modelo_adaptado <- lm(formula_adaptada, data = datos_entrenamiento_adaptado)
    
    # 3. Preparar datos para predicción (imputar NAs restantes)
    df_visit_para_prediccion <- df_visit_nueva %>%
      dplyr::select(all_of(c("participant_id", variables_disponibles)))
    
    # Imputar valores faltantes en variables restantes
    for (col_name in variables_disponibles) {
      if (any(is.na(df_visit_para_prediccion[[col_name]]))) {
        if (is.numeric(df_visit_para_prediccion[[col_name]])) {
          # Imputar numéricos con mediana
          median_val <- median(df_visit_para_prediccion[[col_name]], na.rm = TRUE)
          df_visit_para_prediccion[[col_name]][is.na(df_visit_para_prediccion[[col_name]])] <- median_val
        } else {
          # Imputar no numéricos con moda
          mode_val <- calculate_mode(df_visit_para_prediccion[[col_name]])
          if (!is.na(mode_val)) {
```
