```{r eval=FALSE}
    pAdjustMethod = "BH", 
    pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
    qvalueCutoff = 0.1,
    readable = TRUE
  )
  
  # =============================================================================
  # KEGG PATHWAY ENRICHMENT ANALYSIS
  # =============================================================================
  
  cat("PERFORMING KEGG PATHWAY ENRICHMENT...\n")
  
  kegg_enrichment <- compareCluster(
    entrez ~ domain,
    data = gene_data,
    fun = "enrichKEGG",
    organism = "hsa",
    pAdjustMethod = "BH",
    pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
    qvalueCutoff = 0.1
  )
  
  # =============================================================================
  # REACTOME PATHWAY ENRICHMENT ANALYSIS
  # =============================================================================
  
  cat("PERFORMING REACTOME PATHWAY ENRICHMENT...\n")
  
  # Check if ReactomePA is available
  if (require(ReactomePA, quietly = TRUE)) {
    reactome_enrichment <- compareCluster(
      entrez ~ domain,
      data = gene_data,
      fun = "enrichPathway",
      organism = "human",
      pAdjustMethod = "BH",
      pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
      qvalueCutoff = 0.1,
      readable = TRUE
    )
  } else {
    cat("ReactomePA not available, skipping Reactome enrichment\n")
    reactome_enrichment <- NULL
  }
  
  # =============================================================================
  # CREATE ENHANCED DOTPLOTS
  # =============================================================================
  
  create_enhanced_dotplot <- function(enrichment_result, title, top_n = top_terms) {
    if (is.null(enrichment_result) || nrow(as.data.frame(enrichment_result)) == 0) {
      return(ggplot() + 
               geom_text(aes(x = 0.5, y = 0.5, label = "No significant terms found"), 
                         size = 6) +
               theme_void() +
               ggtitle(title))
    }
    
    # Simplify GO results to reduce redundancy
    if (grepl("GO", title)) {
      enrichment_result <- tryCatch({
        simplify(enrichment_result, cutoff = 0.7, by = "p.adjust", select_fun = min)
      }, error = function(e) {
        enrichment_result
      })
    }
    
    # Create dotplot
    dotplot(enrichment_result, 
            showCategory = top_n,
            font.size = 12,
            title = title) +
      scale_color_gradient(low = "blue", high = "red", 
                           name = "P-value\n(-log10)") +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 12),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 16),
        legend.position = "right",
        panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey90", linewidth = 0.2),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
      )
  }
  
  # Generate all dotplots
  cat("GENERATING DOTPLOTS...\n")
  
  bp_plot <- create_enhanced_dotplot(go_bp, "Gene Ontology - Biological Process\n(Motor vs Non-Motor Domains)")
  mf_plot <- create_enhanced_dotplot(go_mf, "Gene Ontology - Molecular Function\n(Motor vs Non-Motor Domains)") 
  cc_plot <- create_enhanced_dotplot(go_cc, "Gene Ontology - Cellular Component\n(Motor vs Non-Motor Domains)")
  kegg_plot <- create_enhanced_dotplot(kegg_enrichment, "KEGG Pathway Enrichment\n(Motor vs Non-Motor Domains)")
  
  if (!is.null(reactome_enrichment)) {
    reactome_plot <- create_enhanced_dotplot(reactome_enrichment, "Reactome Pathway Enrichment\n(Motor vs Non-Motor Domains)")
  }
  
  # =============================================================================
  # COMPREHENSIVE SUMMARY STATISTICS
  # =============================================================================
  
  cat("\n=== FUSED DOMAIN ENRICHMENT ANALYSIS SUMMARY ===\n")
  cat("Analysis:", domain_name, "\n\n")
  
  # Gene set statistics
  gene_summary <- gene_data %>%
    group_by(domain) %>%
    summarise(
      n_genes = n(),
      original_unique = map_dbl(domain, ~length(fused_gene_sets[[.x]])),
      conversion_rate = n_genes / original_unique
    )
  
  print(gene_summary)
  
  # Enrichment statistics
  cat("\nENRICHMENT RESULTS:\n")
  cat("Biological Process GO:", nrow(as.data.frame(go_bp)), "significant terms\n")
  cat("Molecular Function GO:", nrow(as.data.frame(go_mf)), "significant terms\n") 
  cat("Cellular Component GO:", nrow(as.data.frame(go_cc)), "significant terms\n")
  cat("KEGG Pathways:", nrow(as.data.frame(kegg_enrichment)), "significant pathways\n")
  
  if (!is.null(reactome_enrichment)) {
    cat("Reactome Pathways:", nrow(as.data.frame(reactome_enrichment)), "significant pathways\n")
  }
  
  # =============================================================================
  # TOP ENRICHED TERMS COMPARISON
  # =============================================================================
  
  extract_top_terms <- function(enrichment_result, database) {
    result_df <- as.data.frame(enrichment_result)
    if (nrow(result_df) == 0) return(NULL)
    
    result_df %>%
      group_by(Cluster) %>%
      slice_min(p.adjust, n = 5) %>%
      select(Cluster, Description, p.adjust, Count, GeneRatio) %>%
      mutate(Database = database)
  }
  
  # Extract top terms from all databases
  top_terms_list <- list(
    extract_top_terms(go_bp, "GO_BP"),
    extract_top_terms(go_mf, "GO_MF"),
    extract_top_terms(go_cc, "GO_CC"),
    extract_top_terms(kegg_enrichment, "KEGG")
  )
  
  if (!is.null(reactome_enrichment)) {
    top_terms_list[[5]] <- extract_top_terms(reactome_enrichment, "Reactome")
  }
  
  # Combine all top terms
  all_top_terms <- bind_rows(top_terms_list)
  
  if (!is.null(all_top_terms) && nrow(all_top_terms) > 0) {
    cat("\nTOP ENRICHED TERMS ACROSS DATABASES:\n")
    print(all_top_terms)
  }
  
  # =============================================================================
  # DOMAIN-SPECIFIC ANALYSIS
  # =============================================================================
  
  cat("\n=== DOMAIN-SPECIFIC GENE CHARACTERISTICS ===\n")
  
  # Calculate overlap statistics between original groups
  motor_overlap <- length(intersect(gene_sets_list[["RF Motor"]], 
                                   gene_sets_list[["DEG Motor"]]))
  non_motor_overlap <- length(intersect(gene_sets_list[["RF Non-Motor"]], 
                                       gene_sets_list[["DEG Non-Motor"]]))
  
  cat("Motor Domain Overlap (RF ∩ DEG):", motor_overlap, "genes (",
      round(motor_overlap/length(fused_gene_sets[["Motor_Domain"]])*100, 1), "% of fused set)\n")
  cat("Non-Motor Domain Overlap (RF ∩ DEG):", non_motor_overlap, "genes (",
      round(non_motor_overlap/length(fused_gene_sets[["NonMotor_Domain"]])*100, 1), "% of fused set)\n")
  
  # =============================================================================
  # RETURN RESULTS
  # =============================================================================
  
  results_list <- list(
    fused_gene_sets = fused_gene_sets,
    gene_data = gene_data,
    go_bp = go_bp,
    go_mf = go_mf, 
    go_cc = go_cc,
    kegg = kegg_enrichment,
    plots = list(
      bp_plot = bp_plot,
      mf_plot = mf_plot,
      cc_plot = cc_plot,
      kegg_plot = kegg_plot
    ),
    top_terms = all_top_terms,
    summary = gene_summary,
    overlap_stats = list(
      motor_overlap = motor_overlap,
      non_motor_overlap = non_motor_overlap
    )
  )
  
  if (!is.null(reactome_enrichment)) {
    results_list$reactome <- reactome_enrichment
    results_list$plots$reactome_plot <- reactome_plot
  }
  
  return(results_list)
}

# =============================================================================
# EXECUTE THE FUSED DOMAIN ANALYSIS
# =============================================================================

cat("STARTING FUSED DOMAIN ENRICHMENT ANALYSIS...\n")

# Perform the fused domain enrichment analysis
fused_enrichment_results <- perform_fused_domain_enrichment(
  gene_sets_list = gene_sets_list,
  domain_name = "Motor_vs_NonMotor_Fused_Domains",
  top_terms = 10
)

saveRDS(fused_enrichment_results, "fused_enrichment_results_PPMI")

```


```{r}

fused_enrichment_results <- readRDS("fused_enrichment_results_PPMI")

# Display all plots
cat("\nDISPLAYING FUSED DOMAIN ENRICHMENT PLOTS...\n")
print(fused_enrichment_results$plots$bp_plot)
print(fused_enrichment_results$plots$mf_plot) 
print(fused_enrichment_results$plots$cc_plot)
print(fused_enrichment_results$plots$kegg_plot)

if (!is.null(fused_enrichment_results$plots$reactome_plot)) {
  print(fused_enrichment_results$plots$reactome_plot)
}

# =============================================================================
# SAVE FUSED DOMAIN RESULTS
# =============================================================================

cat("SAVING FUSED DOMAIN RESULTS...\n")

# Save dotplots
ggsave("Fused_Domain_GO_BP.png", fused_enrichment_results$plots$bp_plot, 
       width = 12, height = 8, dpi = 300)
ggsave("Fused_Domain_GO_MF.png", fused_enrichment_results$plots$mf_plot,
       width = 12, height = 8, dpi = 300) 
ggsave("Fused_Domain_GO_CC.png", fused_enrichment_results$plots$cc_plot,
       width = 12, height = 8, dpi = 300)
ggsave("Fused_Domain_KEGG.png", fused_enrichment_results$plots$kegg_plot,
       width = 12, height = 8, dpi = 300)

if (!is.null(fused_enrichment_results$plots$reactome_plot)) {
  ggsave("Fused_Domain_Reactome.png", fused_enrichment_results$plots$reactome_plot,
         width = 12, height = 8, dpi = 300)
}

# Save top terms to CSV
if (!is.null(fused_enrichment_results$top_terms)) {
  write.csv(fused_enrichment_results$top_terms, "Fused_Domain_Enrichment_Top_Terms.csv", row.names = FALSE)
}

# Save fused gene data
write.csv(fused_enrichment_results$gene_data, "Fused_Domain_Gene_Data.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Save fused gene sets
fused_sets_df <- data.frame(
  domain = rep(names(fused_enrichment_results$fused_gene_sets), 
               sapply(fused_enrichment_results$fused_gene_sets, length)),
  gene_symbol = unlist(fused_enrichment_results$fused_gene_sets)
)
write.csv(fused_sets_df, "Fused_Domain_Gene_Sets.csv", row.names = FALSE)

cat("FUSED DOMAIN ANALYSIS COMPLETED SUCCESSFULLY!\n")
cat("Results saved to current directory.\n")

```


## New Figure 4

```{r}

library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(UpSetR)
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
library(grid)
library(gridExtra)
library(png)
library(clusterProfiler)

# Create gene sets list (replace var_imp with your actual variable importance data)
gene_sets_list <- list(
  "RF_Motor" = VarImpMotor,  # Replace with your RF motor features
  "DEG_Motor" = motor_df_DEG$gene,
  "RF_NonMotor" = VarImpNonMotor,  # Replace with your RF non-motor features
  "DEG_NonMotor" = non_motor_df_DEG$gene
)

# =============================================================================
# COLORS
# =============================================================================
color_rf <- "#FF6B00"       # Orange for Random Forest
color_deg <- "#00A8FF"      # Blue for DEG
color_cluster1 <- "#E41A1C" # Red
color_cluster2 <- "#377EB8" # Blue
color_cluster3 <- "#4DAF4A" # Green
color_none <- "gray70"

# =============================================================================
# VOLCANO PLOTS DATA PREPARATION
# =============================================================================

# Motor volcano data
volcano_motor_data <- motor_DEG_results$results %>%
  mutate(
    method = "DEG",
    significance = factor(
      case_when(
        significant == "DEG" & overexpressed_in == "Group 1" ~ "Cluster 1",
        significant == "DEG" & overexpressed_in == "Group 2" ~ "Cluster 2",
        TRUE ~ "Not significant"
      ),
      levels = c("Cluster 1", "Cluster 2", "Not significant")
    )
  )

top_10_motor <- motor_DEG_results$results %>%
  filter(significant == "DEG") %>%
  group_by(overexpressed_in) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = abs(log2FoldChange), n = 10) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    significance = factor(
      case_when(
        overexpressed_in == "Group 1" ~ "Cluster 1",
        overexpressed_in == "Group 2" ~ "Cluster 2",
        TRUE ~ "Not significant"
      ),
      levels = c("Cluster 1", "Cluster 2", "Not significant")
    )
  )

# Non-motor volcano data
volcano_non_motor_data <- non_motor_DEG_results$results %>%
  mutate(
    method = "DEG",
    significance = factor(
      case_when(
        significant == "DEG" & str_detect(comparison, "^1 vs") ~ "Cluster 1",
        significant == "DEG" & str_detect(comparison, "^2 vs") ~ "Cluster 2",
        significant == "DEG" & str_detect(comparison, "^3 vs") ~ "Cluster 3",
        TRUE ~ "Not significant"
      ),
      levels = c("Cluster 1", "Cluster 2", "Cluster 3", "Not significant")
    )
  )

top_10_non_motor <- non_motor_DEG_results$results %>%
  filter(significant == "DEG") %>%
  group_by(comparison) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = abs(log2FoldChange), n = 10) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    significance = factor(
      case_when(
        str_detect(comparison, "^1 vs") ~ "Cluster 1",
        str_detect(comparison, "^2 vs") ~ "Cluster 2", 
        str_detect(comparison, "^3 vs") ~ "Cluster 3",
        TRUE ~ "Not significant"
      ),
      levels = c("Cluster 1", "Cluster 2", "Cluster 3", "Not significant")
    )
  )

# =============================================================================
# COMMON AXIS LIMITS
# =============================================================================
common_y_limits <- range(
  c(-log10(volcano_motor_data$padj), -log10(volcano_non_motor_data$padj)),
  na.rm = TRUE
)
common_y_limits[2] <- common_y_limits[2] * 1.05

common_x_limits <- range(
  c(volcano_motor_data$log2FoldChange, volcano_non_motor_data$log2FoldChange),
  na.rm = TRUE
)
common_x_limits <- common_x_limits * 1.1  # Add some padding

# =============================================================================
# VOLCANO PLOTS
# =============================================================================
volcano_motor <- ggplot(volcano_motor_data, aes(x = log2FoldChange, y = -log10(padj))) +
  geom_point(aes(color = significance, alpha = significance), size = 1.8) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("Cluster 1" = color_cluster1, "Cluster 2" = color_cluster2, "Not significant" = color_none),
    name = "Overexpressed in",
    drop = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("Cluster 1" = 0.8, "Cluster 2" = 0.8, "Not significant" = 0.3), guide = "none") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", color = "darkgray", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-0.5, 0.5), linetype = "dashed", color = "darkgray", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = top_10_motor %>% filter(significance != "Not significant"),
    aes(label = gene, color = significance),
    size = 3, box.padding = 0.4, max.overlaps = 20, segment.color = "grey50", segment.size = 0.3,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = common_y_limits) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = common_x_limits) +
  labs(x = "Log2 Fold Change", y = "-Log10(Adjusted p-value)", title = "Motor Clusters") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 11),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 10),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )

volcano_non_motor <- ggplot(volcano_non_motor_data, aes(x = log2FoldChange, y = -log10(padj))) +
  geom_point(aes(color = significance, alpha = significance), size = 1.8) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("Cluster 1" = color_cluster1, "Cluster 2" = color_cluster2, "Cluster 3" = color_cluster3, "Not significant" = color_none),
    name = "Overexpressed in", 
    drop = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("Cluster 1" = 0.8, "Cluster 2" = 0.8, "Cluster 3" = 0.8, "Not significant" = 0.3), guide = "none") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", color = "darkgray", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-0.5, 0.5), linetype = "dashed", color = "darkgray", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = top_10_non_motor %>% filter(significance != "Not significant"),
    aes(label = gene, color = significance),
    size = 3, box.padding = 0.4, max.overlaps = 20, segment.color = "grey50", segment.size = 0.3,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = common_y_limits) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = common_x_limits) +
  labs(x = "Log2 Fold Change", y = "-Log10(Adjusted p-value)", title = "Non-Motor Clusters") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 11),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 10),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  )

# =============================================================================
# UPSET PLOT (NUEVO PANEL C)
# =============================================================================
names(gene_sets_list) <- c("RF Motor", "DEG Motor", "RF Non-Motor", "DEG Non-Motor")
png("temp_upset.png", width = 8, height = 6, units = "in", res = 300)
upset(fromList(gene_sets_list),
      nsets = 4,
      nintersects = 12,
      order.by = "freq",
      mainbar.y.label = "Number of Genes",
      sets.x.label = "Genes per Method",
      sets.bar.color = c(color_rf, color_deg, color_rf, color_deg),
      matrix.color = "black",
      main.bar.color = "steelblue",
      matrix.dot.alpha = 0.7,
      text.scale = c(1.5, 1.2, 1.5, 1.0, 2.0, 2.0)
)
dev.off()

upset_plot_gg <- ggplot() +
  annotation_custom(
    grid::rasterGrob(png::readPNG("temp_upset.png"), width = unit(1, "npc"), height = unit(1, "npc")),
    xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf
  ) +
  labs(title = "Gene Set Intersections") +
  theme_void() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 12))

# =============================================================================
# FUSED DOMAIN ENRICHMENT DOTPLOT CORREGIDO (NUEVO PANEL D)
# =============================================================================

# Primero ejecutamos el análisis de enriquecimiento fusionado si no existe
if (!exists("fused_enrichment_results")) {
  cat("Performing fused domain enrichment analysis...\n")
  fused_enrichment_results <- perform_fused_domain_enrichment(
    gene_sets_list = gene_sets_list,
    domain_name = "Motor_vs_NonMotor_Fused_Domains",
    top_terms = 10
  )
}

# Verificar la estructura del objeto de enriquecimiento
cat("Structure of fused_enrichment_results$go_bp:\n")
print(class(fused_enrichment_results$go_bp))
print(names(fused_enrichment_results$go_bp))

# Crear el dotplot de manera más robusta
create_corrected_dotplot <- function(enrichment_result, title, top_n = 10) {
  if (is.null(enrichment_result) || nrow(as.data.frame(enrichment_result)) == 0) {
    return(ggplot() + 
             geom_text(aes(x = 0.5, y = 0.5, label = "No significant terms found"), 
                       size = 6) +
             theme_void() +
             ggtitle(title))
  }
  
  # Método 1: Intentar con dotplot estándar primero
  p <- dotplot(enrichment_result, 
               showCategory = top_n,
               title = title,
               font.size = 11)
  
  # Aplicar el formato específico que solicitas
  p + 
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12, angle = 30, hjust = 1),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11),
      plot.title = element_text(size = 16, hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
      legend.title = element_text(size = 11),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey90", linewidth = 0.2),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
    ) +
    scale_color_gradientn(
      colours = c("#f7ca64", "#46bac2", "#7e62a3"),
      trans = "log10",
      guide = guide_colorbar(reverse = TRUE, order = 1),
      name = "p.adjust\n(-log10)"
    ) +
    labs(x = "Domain", y = "GO Biological Process Terms")
}

# Crear el dotplot corregido
fused_dotplot <- create_corrected_dotplot(
  fused_enrichment_results$go_bp, 
  "GO Biological Process Enrichment\n(Fused Motor vs Non-Motor Domains)"
)

# =============================================================================
# COMBINE MAIN FIGURE (A, B, C, D)
# =============================================================================
main_figure <- 
  (volcano_non_motor | volcano_motor) /
  (upset_plot_gg | fused_dotplot) +
  plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1.2)) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = list(c('A', 'B', 'C', 'D'))) &
  theme(plot.tag = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16))

# Guardar figura principal
ggsave("Figure_R4_Main.png",
       plot = main_figure,
       width = 16, height = 14, units = "in", dpi = 300, bg = "white")

# =============================================================================
# HEATMAP PARA MATERIAL SUPLEMENTARIO (ANTIGUO PANEL C)
# =============================================================================

# Prepare data for heatmap
all_genes <- unique(unlist(gene_sets_list))
heatmap_data <- sapply(gene_sets_list, function(x) all_genes %in% x) * 1
rownames(heatmap_data) <- all_genes

heatmap_ggplot_data <- as.data.frame(heatmap_data) %>%
  mutate(Gene = all_genes) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -Gene, names_to = "Analysis", values_to = "Presence")

# Filter: Only genes that appear in at least 2 methods
genes_in_multiple <- rowSums(heatmap_data) >= 2
heatmap_ggplot_data_filtered <- heatmap_ggplot_data %>%
  filter(Gene %in% all_genes[genes_in_multiple])

# Reorder genes by number of analyses they appear in (descending)
gene_counts <- rowSums(heatmap_data)
gene_order <- all_genes[order(gene_counts, decreasing = TRUE)]

# Create heatmap only with genes in at least 2 analyses
supplementary_heatmap <- ggplot(heatmap_ggplot_data_filtered, 
                       aes(x = Analysis, y = factor(Gene, levels = gene_order))) +
  geom_tile(aes(fill = as.factor(Presence)), color = "white", linewidth = 0.2) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("0" = "white", "1" = "#2E86AB"), 
                    labels = c("0" = "Absent", "1" = "Present")) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("RF_Motor" = "RF\nMotor",
                              "DEG_Motor" = "DEG\nMotor", 
                              "RF_NonMotor" = "RF\nNon-Motor",
                              "DEG_NonMotor" = "DEG\nNon-Motor")) +
  labs(x = "Analysis", y = "Genes", fill = "Presence", 
       title = "Gene Overlap Heatmap (Genes in ≥2 Analyses)") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5, size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 14)
  )

# Guardar heatmap como material suplementario
ggsave("Supplementary_Figure_Heatmap.png",
       plot = supplementary_heatmap,
       width = 20, height = 35, units = "in", dpi = 300, bg = "white")

ggsave("Supplementary_Figure_Heatmap.pdf",
       plot = supplementary_heatmap,
       width = 20, height = 35, units = "in")

# =============================================================================
# GUARDAR DOTPLOTS ADICIONALES PARA SUPLEMENTARIO
# =============================================================================

# Función corregida para dotplots suplementarios
create_supplementary_dotplot <- function(enrichment_result, title, top_n = 10) {
  if (is.null(enrichment_result) || nrow(as.data.frame(enrichment_result)) == 0) {
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  p <- dotplot(enrichment_result, 
               showCategory = top_n,
               title = title,
               font.size = 11)
  
  p + 
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12, angle = 30, hjust = 1),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11),
      plot.title = element_text(size = 16, hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
      legend.title = element_text(size = 11),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 10)
    ) +
    scale_color_gradientn(
      colours = c("#f7ca64", "#46bac2", "#7e62a3"),
      trans = "log10",
      guide = guide_colorbar(reverse = TRUE, order = 1),
      name = "p.adjust\n(-log10)"
    )
}

# Guardar todos los dotplots del análisis fusionado como material suplementario
if (!is.null(fused_enrichment_results$go_mf)) {
  supplementary_mf <- create_supplementary_dotplot(
    fused_enrichment_results$go_mf, 
    "GO Molecular Function Enrichment\n(Fused Motor vs Non-Motor Domains)"
  )
  
  if (!is.null(supplementary_mf)) {
    ggsave("Supplementary_Figure_GO_MF.png", supplementary_mf,
           width = 12, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300, bg = "white")
  }
}

if (!is.null(fused_enrichment_results$go_cc)) {
  supplementary_cc <- create_supplementary_dotplot(
    fused_enrichment_results$go_cc, 
    "GO Cellular Component Enrichment\n(Fused Motor vs Non-Motor Domains)"
  )
  
  if (!is.null(supplementary_cc)) {
    ggsave("Supplementary_Figure_GO_CC.png", supplementary_cc,
           width = 12, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300, bg = "white")
  }
}

if (!is.null(fused_enrichment_results$kegg)) {
  supplementary_kegg <- create_supplementary_dotplot(
    fused_enrichment_results$kegg, 
    "KEGG Pathway Enrichment\n(Fused Motor vs Non-Motor Domains)"
  )
  
  if (!is.null(supplementary_kegg)) {
    ggsave("Supplementary_Figure_KEGG.png", supplementary_kegg,
           width = 12, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300, bg = "white")
  }
}

# =============================================================================
# CLEAN UP
# =============================================================================
if(file.exists("temp_upset.png")) file.remove("temp_upset.png")

# =============================================================================
# SUMMARY STATISTICS
# =============================================================================
cat("FIGURE GENERATION COMPLETED!\n")
cat("Main figure saved as: Figure_R4_Main.png\n")
cat("Supplementary figures saved with prefix: Supplementary_Figure_\n\n")

gene_summary <- data.frame(
  Analysis = names(gene_sets_list),
  Number_of_Genes = sapply(gene_sets_list, length)
)
print(gene_summary)



```



## Comparison PPMI-PDBP

```{r}

fused_enrichment_results_PDBP <- readRDS(file.path(base_dir, "PDBP_replication/fused_enrichment_results_PDBP"))

names(fused_enrichment_results)


```

```{r}

# Cargar los resultados si no están en memoria
fused_ppmi <- readRDS("fused_enrichment_results_PPMI")
fused_pdbp <- readRDS(file.path(base_dir, "PDBP_replication/fused_enrichment_results_PDBP"))


# =============================================================================
# FUNCIÓN PARA COMPARAR TÉRMINOS ENRIQUECIDOS
# =============================================================================

compare_enrichment_results <- function(ppmi_results, pdbp_results, pval_cutoff = 0.05) {
  
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(purrr)
  
  # ===========================================================================
  # EXTRAER TÉRMINOS SIGNIFICATIVOS
  # ===========================================================================
  
  extract_significant_terms <- function(enrichment_obj, db_name, source_name) {
    if (is.null(enrichment_obj) || nrow(as.data.frame(enrichment_obj)) == 0) {
      return(NULL)
    }
    
    terms_df <- as.data.frame(enrichment_obj)
    significant_terms <- terms_df %>%
      filter(p.adjust <= pval_cutoff) %>%
      mutate(
        Database = db_name,
        Source = source_name,
        Term_ID = ifelse(!is.na(ID), ID, Description)
      ) %>%
      select(Cluster, Description, p.adjust, Count, GeneRatio, Database, Source, Term_ID)
    
    return(significant_terms)
  }
  
  # ===========================================================================
  # EXTRAER TODOS LOS TÉRMINOS DE AMBAS FUENTES
  # ===========================================================================
  
  cat("EXTRACTING SIGNIFICANT TERMS FROM BOTH DATASETS...\n")
  
  # Lista para almacenar todos los términos
  all_terms_list <- list()
  
  # Extraer términos de PPMI
  if (!is.null(ppmi_results$go_bp)) {
    all_terms_list[["PPMI_GO_BP"]] <- extract_significant_terms(ppmi_results$go_bp, "GO_BP", "PPMI")
  }
  if (!is.null(ppmi_results$go_mf)) {
    all_terms_list[["PPMI_GO_MF"]] <- extract_significant_terms(ppmi_results$go_mf, "GO_MF", "PPMI")
  }
  if (!is.null(ppmi_results$go_cc)) {
    all_terms_list[["PPMI_GO_CC"]] <- extract_significant_terms(ppmi_results$go_cc, "GO_CC", "PPMI")
  }
  if (!is.null(ppmi_results$kegg)) {
    all_terms_list[["PPMI_KEGG"]] <- extract_significant_terms(ppmi_results$kegg, "KEGG", "PPMI")
  }
  if (!is.null(ppmi_results$reactome)) {
    all_terms_list[["PPMI_Reactome"]] <- extract_significant_terms(ppmi_results$reactome, "Reactome", "PPMI")
  }
  
  # Extraer términos de PDBP
  if (!is.null(pdbp_results$go_bp)) {
    all_terms_list[["PDBP_GO_BP"]] <- extract_significant_terms(pdbp_results$go_bp, "GO_BP", "PDBP")
  }
  if (!is.null(pdbp_results$go_mf)) {
    all_terms_list[["PDBP_GO_MF"]] <- extract_significant_terms(pdbp_results$go_mf, "GO_MF", "PDBP")
  }
  if (!is.null(pdbp_results$go_cc)) {
    all_terms_list[["PDBP_GO_CC"]] <- extract_significant_terms(pdbp_results$go_cc, "GO_CC", "PDBP")
  }
  if (!is.null(pdbp_results$kegg)) {
    all_terms_list[["PDBP_KEGG"]] <- extract_significant_terms(pdbp_results$kegg, "KEGG", "PDBP")
  }
  if (!is.null(pdbp_results$reactome)) {
    all_terms_list[["PDBP_Reactome"]] <- extract_significant_terms(pdbp_results$reactome, "Reactome", "PDBP")
  }
  
  # Combinar todos los términos
  all_terms <- bind_rows(all_terms_list)
  
  if (is.null(all_terms) || nrow(all_terms) == 0) {
    cat("No significant terms found in either dataset.\n")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # ===========================================================================
  # ANÁLISIS DE SUPERPOSICIÓN (OVERLAP)
  # ===========================================================================
  
  cat("\n=== OVERLAP ANALYSIS BETWEEN PPMI AND PDBP ===\n")
  
  # Crear identificador único para cada término
  all_terms <- all_terms %>%
    mutate(Unique_Term = paste(Database, Description, Cluster, sep = "|"))
  
  # Términos por fuente y dominio
  terms_summary <- all_terms %>%
    group_by(Source, Cluster, Database) %>%
    summarise(
      n_terms = n(),
      .groups = 'drop'
    )
  
  cat("TERM COUNTS BY SOURCE AND DOMAIN:\n")
  print(terms_summary)
  
  # Identificar términos compartidos
  ppmi_terms <- all_terms %>% filter(Source == "PPMI") %>% pull(Unique_Term) %>% unique()
  pdbp_terms <- all_terms %>% filter(Source == "PDBP") %>% pull(Unique_Term) %>% unique()
  
  shared_terms <- intersect(ppmi_terms, pdbp_terms)
  ppmi_unique <- setdiff(ppmi_terms, pdbp_terms)
  pdbp_unique <- setdiff(pdbp_terms, ppmi_terms)
  
  cat("\nOVERLAP STATISTICS:\n")
  cat("Total unique terms in PPMI:", length(ppmi_terms), "\n")
  cat("Total unique terms in PDBP:", length(pdbp_terms), "\n")
  cat("Shared terms:", length(shared_terms), "\n")
  cat("PPMI-specific terms:", length(ppmi_unique), "\n")
  cat("PDBP-specific terms:", length(pdbp_unique), "\n")
  cat("Overlap coefficient:", round(length(shared_terms) / min(length(ppmi_terms), length(pdbp_terms)), 3), "\n")
  
  # ===========================================================================
  # TÉRMINOS COMPARTIDOS MÁS SIGNIFICATIVOS
  # ===========================================================================
  
  if (length(shared_terms) > 0) {
    cat("\n=== TOP SHARED ENRICHED TERMS ===\n")
    
    shared_df <- all_terms %>%
      filter(Unique_Term %in% shared_terms) %>%
      select(Description, Cluster, Database, p.adjust, Count, Source) %>%
      pivot_wider(
        names_from = Source,
        values_from = c(p.adjust, Count),
        values_fill = list(p.adjust = NA, Count = 0)
      )
    
    # Ordenar por significancia promedio
    shared_df <- shared_df %>%
      mutate(
        avg_padjust = rowMeans(cbind(p.adjust_PPMI, p.adjust_PDBP), na.rm = TRUE)
      ) %>%
      arrange(avg_padjust)
    
    print(head(shared_df, 20))
  }
  
  # ===========================================================================
  # TÉRMINOS ESPECÍFICOS DE CADA FUENTE
  # ===========================================================================
  
  if (length(ppmi_unique) > 0) {
    cat("\n=== TOP PPMI-SPECIFIC TERMS ===\n")
    ppmi_specific <- all_terms %>%
      filter(Unique_Term %in% ppmi_unique) %>%
      arrange(p.adjust) %>%
      select(Description, Cluster, Database, p.adjust, Count) %>%
      head(15)
    
    print(ppmi_specific)
  }
  
  if (length(pdbp_unique) > 0) {
    cat("\n=== TOP PDBP-SPECIFIC TERMS ===\n")
    pdbp_specific <- all_terms %>%
      filter(Unique_Term %in% pdbp_unique) %>%
      arrange(p.adjust) %>%
      select(Description, Cluster, Database, p.adjust, Count) %>%
      head(15)
    
    print(pdbp_specific)
  }
  
  # ===========================================================================
  # GRÁFICOS COMPARATIVOS
  # ===========================================================================
  
  plots <- list()
  
  # 1. Gráfico de superposición (Venn-like)
  overlap_data <- data.frame(
    Source = c("PPMI", "PDBP", "Shared"),
    Count = c(length(ppmi_unique), length(pdbp_unique), length(shared_terms))
  )
  
  plots$overlap_plot <- ggplot(overlap_data, aes(x = Source, y = Count, fill = Source)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
    geom_text(aes(label = Count), vjust = -0.5) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("PPMI" = "blue", "PDBP" = "red", "Shared" = "purple")) +
    labs(title = "Term Overlap Between PPMI and PDBP",
         y = "Number of Terms") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "none")
  
  # 2. Términos compartidos por dominio
  if (length(shared_terms) > 0) {
    shared_by_domain <- all_terms %>%
      filter(Unique_Term %in% shared_terms) %>%
      group_by(Cluster, Database) %>%
      summarise(n_shared = n(), .groups = 'drop')
    
    plots$shared_domain_plot <- ggplot(shared_by_domain, aes(x = Cluster, y = n_shared, fill = Database)) +
      geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
      labs(title = "Shared Terms by Domain and Database",
           y = "Number of Shared Terms") +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
  }
  
  # ===========================================================================
  # RESUMEN COMPARATIVO
  # ===========================================================================
  
  cat("\n=== COMPREHENSIVE COMPARISON SUMMARY ===\n")
  
  # Resumen por dominio y base de datos
  comparison_summary <- all_terms %>%
    group_by(Source, Cluster, Database) %>%
    summarise(
      n_terms = n(),
      avg_padjust = mean(p.adjust, na.rm = TRUE),
      min_padjust = min(p.adjust, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = 'drop'
    )
  
  print(comparison_summary)
  
  # ===========================================================================
  # RETURN RESULTS
  # ===========================================================================
  
  results <- list(
    all_terms = all_terms,
    overlap_stats = list(
      ppmi_total = length(ppmi_terms),
      pdbp_total = length(pdbp_terms),
      shared = length(shared_terms),
      ppmi_unique = length(ppmi_unique),
      pdbp_unique = length(pdbp_unique),
      overlap_coefficient = length(shared_terms) / min(length(ppmi_terms), length(pdbp_terms))
    ),
    shared_terms = if (length(shared_terms) > 0) shared_df else NULL,
    ppmi_specific = if (length(ppmi_unique) > 0) ppmi_specific else NULL,
    pdbp_specific = if (length(pdbp_unique) > 0) pdbp_specific else NULL,
    plots = plots,
    summary = comparison_summary
  )
  
  return(results)
}

# =============================================================================
# EJECUTAR EL ANÁLISIS COMPARATIVO
# =============================================================================

cat("COMPARING PPMI AND PDBP ENRICHMENT RESULTS...\n")

comparison_results <- compare_enrichment_results(
  ppmi_results = fused_ppmi,
  pdbp_results = fused_pdbp,
  pval_cutoff = 0.05
)

# Guardar resultados comparativos
saveRDS(comparison_results, "PPMI_PDBP_comparison_results.rds")

# =============================================================================
# ANÁLISIS ESPECÍFICO POR DOMINIO
# =============================================================================

# Función para comparar dominios específicos
compare_domains <- function(ppmi_results, pdbp_results, domain = "Motor_Domain") {
  
  extract_domain_terms <- function(results, domain_name, source_name) {
    terms_list <- list()
    
    if (!is.null(results$go_bp)) {
      df <- as.data.frame(results$go_bp)
      terms_list[["GO_BP"]] <- df %>% 
        filter(Cluster == domain_name, p.adjust <= 0.05) %>%
        mutate(Source = source_name, Database = "GO_BP")
    }
    
    if (!is.null(results$go_mf)) {
      df <- as.data.frame(results$go_mf)
      terms_list[["GO_MF"]] <- df %>% 
        filter(Cluster == domain_name, p.adjust <= 0.05) %>%
        mutate(Source = source_name, Database = "GO_MF")
    }
    
    if (!is.null(results$go_cc)) {
      df <- as.data.frame(results$go_cc)
      terms_list[["GO_CC"]] <- df %>% 
        filter(Cluster == domain_name, p.adjust <= 0.05) %>%
        mutate(Source = source_name, Database = "GO_CC")
    }
    
    if (!is.null(results$kegg)) {
      df <- as.data.frame(results$kegg)
      terms_list[["KEGG"]] <- df %>% 
        filter(Cluster == domain_name, p.adjust <= 0.05) %>%
        mutate(Source = source_name, Database = "KEGG")
    }
    
    bind_rows(terms_list)
  }
  
  ppmi_domain <- extract_domain_terms(ppmi_results, domain, "PPMI")
  pdbp_domain <- extract_domain_terms(pdbp_results, domain, "PDBP")
  
  cat("\n=== COMPARISON FOR", domain, "===\n")
  cat("PPMI terms:", nrow(ppmi_domain), "\n")
  cat("PDBP terms:", nrow(pdbp_domain), "\n")
  
  # Términos compartidos
  shared <- intersect(ppmi_domain$Description, pdbp_domain$Description)
  cat("Shared terms:", length(shared), "\n")
  
  if (length(shared) > 0) {
    cat("Shared term examples:\n")
    print(head(shared, 10))
  }
}

# Comparar ambos dominios
compare_domains(fused_ppmi, fused_pdbp, "Motor_Domain")
compare_domains(fused_ppmi, fused_pdbp, "NonMotor_Domain")



# Ver resultados principales
print(comparison_results$overlap_stats)

# Ver términos compartidos
View(comparison_results$shared_terms)

# Ver términos específicos de PPMI
View(comparison_results$ppmi_specific)

# Ver términos específicos de PDBP  
View(comparison_results$pdbp_specific)

# Generar gráficos
comparison_results$plots$overlap_plot
comparison_results$plots$shared_domain_plot


# Crear heatmap de términos compartidos
create_comparison_heatmap <- function(comparison_results) {
  shared_terms <- comparison_results$shared_terms
  
  if (is.null(shared_terms)) return(NULL)
  
  # Preparar datos para heatmap
  heatmap_data <- shared_terms %>%
    select(Description, p.adjust_PPMI, p.adjust_PDBP) %>%
    mutate(across(c(p.adjust_PPMI, p.adjust_PDBP), ~ -log10(.))) %>%
    column_to_rownames("Description")
  
  pheatmap::pheatmap(
    heatmap_data,
    main = "Comparative Significance of Shared Terms\n(-log10 p-adjust)",
    cluster_rows = TRUE,
    cluster_cols = FALSE,
    show_rownames = TRUE,
    fontsize_row = 8
  )
}

create_comparison_heatmap(comparison_results)



create_significance_scatter <- function(comparison_results) {
  shared_terms <- comparison_results$shared_terms
  
  if (is.null(shared_terms)) return(NULL)
  
  ggplot(shared_terms, aes(x = -log10(p.adjust_PPMI), y = -log10(p.adjust_PDBP))) +
    geom_point(aes(color = Database, size = Count_PPMI + Count_PDBP), alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "blue") +
    labs(
      title = "Comparative Significance of Shared Terms",
      x = "PPMI Significance (-log10 p-adjust)",
      y = "PDBP Significance (-log10 p-adjust)"
    ) +
    theme_minimal()
}

create_significance_scatter(comparison_results)


create_database_comparison <- function(comparison_results) {
  all_terms <- comparison_results$all_terms
  
  db_summary <- all_terms %>%
    group_by(Source, Database) %>%
    summarise(
      n_terms = n(),
      avg_significance = mean(-log10(p.adjust)),
      .groups = 'drop'
    )
  
  ggplot(db_summary, aes(x = Database, y = n_terms, fill = Source)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
    labs(
      title = "Term Distribution by Database and Source",
      y = "Number of Significant Terms"
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
}


create_database_comparison(comparison_results)


```
